text:
Title: A bit too tiny sponges with handle for applying liquid foundation or cream blush
Review: There are 12 small round with tear drop tip foam sponges with ribbon handles in this package with one plastic carry case for the used sponge. They are a bit too tiny in size as the handle can only be slipped over two of my fingers. Nevertheless, this works well to apply cream foundation or for blending cream rouge (cheek creams/blush). The current price of $9.99 comes to a pricey $0.83 cents per sponge. If these were a little bigger I would have rated them 4 stars.

Title: Great case/cover keypad for IPad Air
Review: Not sure why all the negative reviews on this Logitech item. All I can think of is that there were problems initially with the cover which Logitech corrected in a later release. Anyway, I love this cover. I find it protects my IPad Air oerfectly and looks sharp and sleek. The keyboard itself is neatly inside and, when opened, allows for a feeling that you are typing on a traditional full size keyboard. Although not inexpensive by any means, it is a great tool to use particularly when doing a lot of typing (I hate using the keyboard on the screen). I highly recommend this to everyone. Like I said, I could find no fault with the cover/case an it performs as it should.

Title: I don’t like the smell or cleaning power of this wash; pump also sticks Review: I tried this during my shower on part of my body. I could not stand it, that I had to stop. The aroma is unpleasant, the wash does not lather well at all, and I do not feel clean afterward. I definitely do not want to use this anymore on my body and absolutely would not use this for my hair after having tried this. In addition, the pump also sticks on this bottle which is another negative.

Note that it is 99.6% plant based and is considered vegan. The current price of $14.99 is expensive for 250 ml (8.454 fluid ounces).

Title: Hoped for the best, very disappointed.
Review: Unpredictable, this is my second unit, red display light goes on and off by itself along with radio. One hour timer does not turn off. Sound is good, fm antenna is sub par. The manual is poorly written with no way to contact seller, Amazon is aware of this problem and correcting it.

Title: Long chain
Review: Love the chain it works great.

Title: Just bought and we are returning. It captured the ... Review: Just bought and we are returning. It captured the post lady dropping the package off on the porch. . . and later the woman across the street running and yelling after some unknown persons. BUT, it didn't capture AT ALL the thug that walked up the sidewalk and took the package in between. Explain that to a cop!

In fairness, it picks up sound very well. I heard everything the woman yelled from across the street. Still, cannot give a product a second chance after such an epic fail. It has one job!

Title: Zipper broke after a week
Review: Very pretty sturdy material but flimsy zipper

Title: Way cheaper than replacing a headset
Review: Was going to order a new headset when the cushions were starting to come off, decided to try these first. They were easy to install and I found a video on YouTube to help. Headset is now good as new.

Title: Broke after very little usage
Review: Loved it while it worked. When it was only nine months old I moved it from under my desk to the top has never worked again. Quite angry. Of course not covered by warranty.

Title: Great way to keep your feet looking great!
Review: I have suffered from rough skin on my feet for years (soles and balls of my feet). I typically go to a nail salon every two to three weeks but I honestly need some work sooner than that and it gets expensive. When I saw this, I really wanted to try it as a between salon gadget. This is great. Super easy to use and the vacuum picks up all of the dandar from my feet. I highly recommend to anyone who feels they need touch ups or in lieu of a salon visit.

Title: Would not buy again Review: did not like this vest. Do not wash as it does not get any
Better.

Title: I hate this mask becauseheadband tie does not work for me but mask works if tied in back
Review: I really hate this mask. It is two ply and comes all in one piece that is more like a scarf than a mask. There is a long tie that flows out the back. It is impossible to tie this as a headband on my head. Instead for this mask to work, I have to tie the long scarf-like strips in the back of my head and let it hang down. The mask is functional but disappointing. The current price of $10.99 is outrageous for this. I suppose if a woman has long hair, then this might work because the hair will allow the tie to have something to hold on to on the bottom. I have should length hair.

Title: Perfume Smell
Review: Has a perfume smell that stays all day.  Other than that it works great.  I just couldn't stand the smell.

Title: Piece of junk
Review: Feels like a dollar store fan.  Only has 2 speeds, not 3.  On "high",. It barely blows any air.  Of course low is worse.  I have a cheaper fan that is smaller, has 3 speeds and blows out way more air.  I wanted something a bit stronger for summer.

Title: Too Strong of Fragrance
Review: I was looking for a salt scrub to use on my hands.  I have tried several different salt and sugar scrubs over the years. I've classified them in to two different types. There are the dry ones and wet ones. This is one of the wet ones. When you scoop it out, it's dense and a bit solid, like Crisco. The amount of salt is decent and allows for adequate sloughing. But the consistency is greasier than what I wanted. After I rub it in to my hands, I rinse it off with warm to hot water. Even after I had removed all of the product, I had to keep rinsing because it leaves greasiness behind. I was satisfied with how the product left my hands feeling though. I was also disappointed with the fragrance. I was expecting a more cherry/fruity scent with a bit of floral to it. Instead it's more of a flowery perfume and a bit too strong. I love a strong fragrance, but not this one. It isn't a natural scent. The price was good, but not what I was wanting.

Title: The style and length are a bit misleading
Review: The fit was as expected. However, I am returning this item. The bottom layer, where there is some solid fabric, is actually fairly short and is angled. The rest of the bottom layer and additional layers on top are completely see through. If you've got wider hips, it's going to be far too short unless you wear something else underneath. I didn't want to have to modify the dress or the outfit as a whole, so I did not keep it.

Title: Hydrating but leaves a feeling of product on my skin; do not care for aroma
Review: I love the jar packaging, drawstring bag, and the zinc spatula that comes with this set. The moisturizer is relatively thick like I like my moisturizes to be. However, when I rub this into my face and next, it does not absorb and my face feels tacky. Also, I do not care for the aroma of the cream. It is definitely hydrating but it is not for me.

Title: Love it
Review: Absolutely love this suit. I went one size up and it fit great. Very flattering.

Title: columbia rain jacket
Review: This jacket seemed to run a bit smaller than I would have liked... I wanted to be able to wear over a sweater or long sleeved shirt... it was snug at the bust and also the arms.  I am 5'7" ... usually wear a 14/16 or 0x/1x.

Title: photo project
Review: I bought these to help preserve the 3 giant tub of loose photos I had in the storage unit.  I feel like I have done my part to project these ancient bits of old technology and hope my daughter finds them amusing 50 years from now.  :)

Title: I would recommend.
Review: Bright vibrant colors, only the top ran a little bit short in length. I would recommend.

Title: They're ok for small cords.
Review: Power strip cord wont fit.

Title: Great roll on protection, not to be worn with a sleeveless black d
Review: Rating this as 4 stars. Although I love the clean, fresh fragrance, I am not a fan of the residue or film that this product leaves on you after you apply it. For that very reason, I usually steer clear of anything but gels for my daily use. However, I will say that this Dove deodorant did apply easily, is beautifully designed and as I mentioned earlier has an amazing fresh scent. I know there are people out there that love this type of rollon, but since I often like to go sleeveless, I prefer a product that you can not see if you raise your arms. This is a great protector, though, as I wore it while playing tennis and I did feel fresh and clean when I was done (just as well if not better than any gel deodorant I may use.

Title: Corner shelf.
Review: Unfortunately this little corner shelf would not stick to the wall & hold a room deodorizer. I was disappointed.

Title: Roller
Review: Work pretty well

Title: Great price, works well
Review: i think these work really well.

Title: Cheap product Review: The inner draw string came out after they were washed the first time.
Now after a couple wears the elastic is just bunched up and turned around
Waste of money, even though they're moderately cheap

Title: 16ft USB booster extension cable
Review: due to the location and arrangement of my computer components, this cable was a life saver. my printer is kind of far away from the computer: this cable was perfect. . .

Title: Faulty the reset button did not work.
Review: The reset button didn't work. The signal for wifi 7 foot away from router (using the extender) was horrible. After hour on the phone with support, (after finally get ahold of someone) her conclusion was the rest button did not work.

Title: Not comfortable
Review: Rough cheap poly fabric. Returned the shorts

Title: No idea how it is
Review: Received a silver chain instead of lip balm

Title: At first it feels like silicone, then dries fast, and my lips feel dry. Review: The tube the Zing lip color comes in looks good. It is a black square with Zing on it, a clear line
Down the middle that shows the color, and I’m guessing shows how much is in the tube when you keep using. I like
That idea.

I’m fair and wear light color lipsticks, but at first this looks like it has a white frost when I put it on, or it’s too light for me.
On my lips it feels like a thin silicone, then dries fast, and my lips feel dry.

I’m not a fan of this product for me.

Title: I didn't like it, left sticky residue. Review: I don't believe there's truly a "rinse free" cleaning product out there.
I've tried several & this is the last time.
The only reason I tried this one, was because it was recommended to me by a friend w some of the same issues I have.
I have severe back, neck & hip issues, with severe pain & can't get into a shower or bath anymore.
If I could do all the bending & twisting needed, to spray this stuff on & then wipe off, I don't know why I need a product like this in the first place, lol.
It smelled alright, but left my arms & legs sticky, even after wiping off with paper or cotton towels.
It did eventually dry, but it just isn't very helpful for me.

Title: Moisturizes but does not absorb; smells like sour watermelon rind; nothing special – 2.5 stars
Review: This is a one ounce pump tube of eye cream for the current price of $22.09 ($25.99 minus 15%). The tube dispenses a lot of cream with one pump so I have to be careful not to press too hard as only a little cream is necessary. I used this regularly around my eye area and it did hydrate my lids and under my eyes. However, I did not find it to be firming and the solution does not absorb well. In addition, the cream smells like sour watermelon rind to me, which is mildly offensive. Oil of Olay face creams (which can be used around the eyes) are so much better. After having tried this, I would never purchase it.

Title: Great Innovation
Review: This Apple product makes it easy to find anything lost such as keys, wallets, backpacks, etc.  About the size of a nickel and very easy to set up and can be used with iPhone, iPad, etc.

Title: DirectTV Now all but unusable on Fire TV Cube
Review: I've been trying to use the cube with DTVNow for a few months now and have reset to factory defaults, deinstalled app multiple times and still have the same issue, which is the video and audio will stutter when starting the app after being dormant overnight or idle for several hours.  If I restart the Fire Cube, the app will work ok.  It's never been as fast the Gen 2 FireTV box we had but I was willing to deal with that for the slick device control the Cube offered. Not being able to use my primary  TV streaming service is a show stopper. Shame as it could have been a great device, I suspect it's a processor and/or lack of memory issue, but not certain. Will be selling it CHEAP and replacing with with a ROKU or Invidia Shield.

Title: Piece of crap...Or 60 pieces of crap, rather!
Review: I can't even get a single bottle open! And they are WAY smaller than they look in the ad! I am so disappointed! These were going to be Bingo prizes for the ladies at my Skilled Nursing Facility! 😣 Do NOT buy, unless you like wasting your money! Mio bottle added for size reference.

Title: Not worth the price
Review: Very cheap dollar store quality brush.

Title: Do not buy
Review: Could not focus.

Title: Rip Off
Review: Works, but is a whimpy cable that will most likely not hold up to any real use. Would not buy again. Will look for something in the aftermarket that's built better!

Title: Good value
Review: Good value! Cute and soft.

Title: Case iPod
Review: Ok just good quality as I was hoping for but does the job

Title: Good Shoe/Sneaker
Review: I work in a hospital so these shoes are very nice because they are easy for walking.  The only downside is the arch support isn't what it could be and so I have to alternate between this shoe and another or I get sore feet.

Title: Not Crew Socks
Review: These could be nice socks but they are way too long. They come up to right below my knee.

Title: Three Stars
Review: had to return these. too small for 11 wide (D) foot.

Title: Get the Rockport City Smart wingtips instead
Review: I bought these because they were $40 cheaper than the other Rockports I usually buy and seemed the same. Big mistake. The upper is similar but doesn't have the cushioned strip around the back so there's a break-in period while the shoe rubs against your Achilles. But worse, the heel -- which is brown and looks out of place with the black shoe -- falls apart. I've worn them about 20 times and first the heel got scratched up and this morning a strip about three inches long came loose and was protruding from the back of the shoe. I had to cut it off. If you want Rockports buy the City Smart wingtips instead.

Title: Two Stars
Review: This item did not fit my nook

Title: See through
Review: Cute dress, but it is fully see through. The fabric is very very thin. Such a cute fabric, but it’s so sweet through it cannot be worn.

Title: It works!
Review: As expected, Glyph products function as expected out of the box with the necessary connections included.

Title: I wanted these to last
Review: They did not lay

Title: One Star
Review: This looks like something you would buy at Claire's. This is not an 80 dollar bracelet.

Title: Heavy Duty gooseneck clamps
Review: Great idea... but so stiff...difficult to adjust... might loosen up over time but heavy and so stiff.. wont use enough to find out how long over time will be. One positive is that it can hold a heavy reflector without sagging...Clamps super strong

Title: Expected better
Review: Fits as expected, but the material is cheap. I guess I expected it to be better quality for the overall star rating it received.

Title: Good Value
Review: A very good value for $20, but would be nice to have a volume control.  Also the headset has no padding on top (part that rests on top of head).  I would only use this as a portable, part-time headset.

Title: The case makes this practically impossible to use & comb is cheap Review: The case makes this impossible to use. In fact, I feel that the comb is fastened into the wrong side of the case on the one I received because the cut for the tail of the comb has to be longer on the side the comb flips out. Unfortunately, on the case I received, the long cut is on the opposite side (see photo).

It is practically impossible to use this comb in its current position because it never opens fully. This is a terrible design. In addition, it feels cheap like plastic.

UPDATE March 1, 2020 - I fixed the case by unscrewing the rivets on either side and moving the comb to the side with the longer opening. The comb now unfolds correctly. However, this is still a cheap comb and the design still makes it somewhat difficult because the case is flimsy.

Title: Not what I expected...
Review: I have a really big head and was hoping this would be okay at least to get around my head to my mouth but this literally fits as a bracelet for me I just double turn it as such but overall I found it to be extremely small and not very stretchy, I am completely unsure if this is the actual purpose of this mask to be not so stretchy but I highly doubt I would be able to breathe with this on if I could even get it on. To be completely honest I know I have a big head but still I was not expecting it to be that small. In general the design is beautiful and material is great! I will be using it as a bracelet instead I think. But I would not buy it for an adult maybe for a kid or teenager.

Title: Started falling apart within 2 months
Review: I mean they’re comfy but they don’t last more than a couple of weeks. They have started coming apart at the seams. I don’t have this issue with any underwear I’ve purchased from other brands. Save your money.

Title: Too small
Review: I wear a XL size, but I got 2XX for this to make them extra loose for comfort. The 2XX was way too small! Get at least two sizes bigger than what you usually wear.

Title: Dainty
Review: While this is a pretty and dainty necklace, it's still a bit disappointing. The measurements are provided, so it should not be a surprise to the actual size. There's some sparkle to it, but it's difficult to distinguish separate diamonds. The chain is on the short size, but it can be extended to another inch. It is made well as far as I can tell. I am a mom and if I was given this by my young child I would fuss over it and probably wear it at least once or twice. I'm a plus sized mom and the size of the letters is just lost on me.

Title: Camcorder
Review: Not at all what I expected.  I thought this was a HD Camcorder, here it was to attach and be a helmet cam, which is not what I wanted.  I sent this product back, but the return was very easy.

Title: Microfiber Cleaning Cloth Works Much Better Review: These leather-backed felt TARGUS CLEANING PADS are good-looking, but they're not nearly as effective as a microfiber lens cleaning cloth (e.g., [[ASIN:B004PHD2YU 3M Microfiber Lens Cleaning Cloth]]) when it comes to removing fingerprints, dust, and large bits of debris from a touchscreen device. Another advantage of a microfiber cleaning cloth is that it's washable.

Because of the rounded corners, the Targus pads are useless for cleaning a tablet's square corners, if the tablet is enclosed in a protective case. Maybe the pads would clean the corners if I pressed hard, but I'm not willing to risk breaking the touchscreen! I rate this product at 2 stars ("I don't like it" on the Amazon scale).

Title: Too floppy
Review: I needed a case sturdy enough so I could prop it up in bed. This worked for a couple of days before giving out and getting floppy.  So not worth the money.

Title: Nice chain
Review: Liked the chain, fit on my pendant, just what I needed. Thanks very much

Title: Priced like the best but not the best
Review: Work best with Apple products. ANC is improved. Adaptive transparency is interesting. The friction fit only design still falls out way too easily. The Pro2 case is easier to find; however, the whole location thing is a bit wonky. Still fundamentally flawed due to lack of graphic equalizer adjustments. Are they worth the cost to upgrade? No. Are they worth the cost compared to Bose or Sony buds. Objectively, no.

Title: Nawww
Review: Didn come with instructions or a sim card

Title: Didn't work
Review: Doesn't  pair with any device.

Title: Okeeffe's hand cream
Review: My husband is working guy and has dry, cracked hands - and heels.  He's been using this daily and the cracks have disappeared.  He has thrown out every other cream/oil/paste we've tried.  It's Okeeffe's only for him.  I'm thinking of trying it on my heels too.

Title: Mine fell apart quickly
Review: I bought this for my mother and it kind of disintegrated when I touched it, lol! Definitely don't mess with the little Apple circle in the middle, because the glue will come off!

Title: Smells like detergent from yesteryear; cleans well but has lackluster lather
Review: There is one bar of soap in this package.  It smells like a detergent soap my grandmother used to use and is not very enticing to me. It does clean well but the lather is lackluster. There is nothing special about this soap to me. Also, the current price of $8.99 is pricey for this.

Title: You need this
Review: OMG best straightener and curler I have owned. I have bought $200 units that don't come close.

Title: Can get it to connect
Review: Wont connect to my iPad or iPhone. Shows up in Bluetooth settings but wont connect.

Title: Awesome product! Hood, scarf, and face mask in one! Review: I am a petite woman, and this product fit me very well. Based on some of the other reviews, I was worried that it would be too big. It fits just right, and I think it would fit most people well. The trick is not to pull the hood too far forward unless you are using the drawstring to keep your face warm. The face mask potion can be held over your nose or pushed under the chin, making it versatile. It's made from a soft, warm fleece. In extreme windchill situations it might not be warm though - but I don't expect wind-proofing from a $10 product. It could probably be worn under another hood for extra warmth and wind resistance.

I have night classes, so I can't avoid long chilly walks. I think this product will help keep me warm and make my walks a lot more comfortable. Thanks!

Title: Not Durable
Review: After 1 year, rips formed along the seams at the hem and on the sides of the waist.  Nice if you like the naturally-occurring distressed, damaged, torn look.  Not so nice if you looking for jeans made from quality materials with good stiching that will stay together.

Title: Not for Acrylic!
Review: These are not for acrylic. I purchase multiple boxes thinking they were and I destroyed a few so I can’t return now. The acrylics just damaged them.

Title: Heavy, hangy, runs big Review: I received a M and this and it runs big.
The material is heavy , hangy , itchy and cheesy looking.

I’m not a fan of this top.

Title: Very nice!
Review: This is very nice and sturdy. The only reason I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 is the design is a bit flawed. The top tier should be higher to accommodate perfumes on the bottom. I have all the space under the top shelf that I can’t use because my bottles are too tall. Otherwise, very nice.

Title: Cost issue
Review: Very soft, nice fit. So overpriced for tighty whiteys.

Title: One Star
Review: This is like a doll's brush...absolutely useless.  Don't buy.  And I'm not allowed to return it.

Title: Great coverage, light, non-greasy.
Review: I have no idea why someone complained about this new Superstay. I got this through the Vine program. I found it light, not greasy, and full coverage (covered my pores without being too heavy). This Natural color blends perfectly with my skin tone (I am Irish heritage but I do have a medium complexion). I honestly couldn't be happier with this and I do plan to purchase more when I run out. It has solid coverage, but is not greasy or heavy. Very natural looking.

Title: Five Stars
Review: great!

Title: Cheap
Review: Cheap

Title: Nice device, works well on thinner hairs - great for upper lip
Review: This Cadeya Eyebrow Hair Remover is a nice product. Sleek, thin, easy to use and relatively quiet. I use it for between eyebrow threading visits and it has helped me space out the visits a little more.  I cannot use this exclusively, though, as my eyebrows tend to grow relatively thick and this razor really isn't good for thicker hair. I like it on peach fuzz (like new growth between my brows and my upper lip). Nice addition to my bathroom routine.

Title: Good
Review: Es grande caben muchas cosas y tiene compartimientos es seguro

Title: so so
Review: Definitely not the color I expected w the purple. Still pretty though.

Title: Too small
Review: Loved the style, but it was too narrow in the hips for me to wear.

Title: This charger works perfect for my macbook air
Review: It charges just as well and as quickly as the charger that came with my macbook.  It's small, making it great for traveling.  It fits well.

Title: Runs very small in "girth" around body, although long in length, easily "belted" for different look.
Review: Fabric is thin.  Appears acceptable in manufacturing quality but would NOT buy off the rack if casually shopping.  Quality isn't worth the price but the color selection/availability is good

Title: Grandaughter loved it !
Review: My grandaugther just loved this dress. She is only 6 but said this is a big girl dress not for babies. Can wait to see her go to school in it. I ordered a 7. A little big now but perfect next month.

Title: Cute owl pajamas, good fit but fabric is not very comfortable.
Review: This pajama is really cute and pretty although too small, it comes advertised as a woman's, but it feels more as a 15 to 18 year old's, or for petite women. The fit is good still, even though it's small. The fabric is a little too rough for me.

Title: Disappointed in some ways
Review: The display is bright and beautiful. It's way faster than my android tablet and there are a lot of things I really like about it. However there are things I really don't like and had I known about these things, and maybe I should have, I wouldn't have chosen a Kindle. The main thing, unless there is some secret I am unaware of, is not being able to install Google Earth which I use almost daily. And today I find out you have to pay for Google drive on a Kindle, another  thing I use a lot. What's up with that? Never had to pay before. Who knows what I'll find out next. Almost afraid to keep looking. So just be aware of these things if you decide to go with a Kindle. And if I'm wrong about any of this, someone please let me know and I'll gladly update my review.

Title: One Star
Review: Not easy to figure it out and runs small

Title: Not a sweatshirt.. Review: Love the product. Came 5 days late because somehow it was accidentally deleted by amazon or seller am
beautiful sweater/T Not a sweatshirt. came 5 days late because accidentally cancelled by amazon or seller and they reordered. runs severely small. Going to try to reorder next size because i do like it and quality of shirt is nice

Title: I can not get it to work
Review: Alexa will turn Fire TV on and off and that is it. I been working with that control for days, it just seen to be a forgein object to my TV I have  " Primete control and it works just fine with the buttoms. I am disgusted for buying this useless clicker.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Powder cake came cracked. Still usable.

Title: Love the fragrance & how it leaves my hair feeling soft but it relaxes my curls too much
Review: I love the fragrance of this shampoo, conditioner, and styling cream trio. The shampoo lathers and cleans well and the conditioner detangles well. Unfortunately, my normally curly hair turned out soft and flat. When I decided to apply the styling cream, I was able to produce some body but was not overly pleased with the results. I personally do not like products in my hair, so if I have to apply a styling cream daily to get good results then this is not for me. The current price of $39.99 is pricey but that comes to $13.33 per bottle. Note that the shampoo and conditioner are both 12 fluid ounces and the styling cream is 8 ounces.

Title: very well made!
Review: love this product

Title: ear bud covers
Review: Don't work with the Samsung earbud pros... so they are junk to me... gotta pay better attention to the details when purchasing (hubby - GRRR).  They are a nice selection of moldable foam tips if you have something they will fit on.

Title: Check the size!
Review: I ordered this on Black Friday and the size said it was from 6-11 I think it is wrongly sized because it did not fit me. I am a size 10 shoe and this was wayyy too small for me. I included some pictures to show how it looks in size compared to my feet and normal socks. They are extremely tight.

Title: A life saver
Review: I suffer from high arches and neuropathy so finding any type/brand of footwear that is kind to my feet has been extremely difficult to say the least.  These sneakers have been a true blessing, the arch is just right where it should be so my feet don't scream when I take the shoes off and they are comfortable.  They are light weight and they slip on, no tying necessary (YEAH).  I use them to walk the track at the gym.  I tell everyone with foot problems about these wonderful shoes and I intend to purchase more so I hope they don't discontinue them.

Title: Counterfeit/False Advertising. Do NOT buy. Review: I picked up a 32GB one of these since I had some Amazon courtesy credit and ordered something else but I wanted the free shipping so I needed something cheap..I got this.

You can tell from the benchmarks I’ve posted that this product is NOT what it says it is.

Do NOT buy if you value your money.

I would return mine today (it just got delivered this afternoon) but the $7 in courtesy credit I used to buy it wasn’t worth it.

I will never buy PNY again. Too many counterfeits out there and if they aren’t counterfeits they’re falsely advertised.

Title: Not real sturdy but fits perfectly! Review: Most of the reviews on this case are actually reviews for the Vankyo S8 tablet. The case fits the tablet perfectly, but it is rather
flimsy and hard to hold. Probably the best of the few cases that fit this tablet!

Title: Cute, Cheap Drawstring Bag Review: My daughter wanted/needed a cheap drawstring backpack for marching band camp. She needed it to be somewhat waterproof, just in case it rains, so the polyester material fit the bill. We don't have huge expectations for this, but we're hoping it lasts through band camp. She doesn't have to carry a whole lot in it, so there shouldn't be too much strain on the grommets. The polka dot design is cute and preppy.

*Update 7/23/2016: It didn't last through band camp. The string broke after just one week of camp. I had to buy her a new bag for the second week of camp.

Title: A Great Deep Clean Review: I love this face wash! I've used so many face washes over the years. This one yes ranks right up there with the high priced versions without the big price tag.

If you're looking for a deep clean that also helps to hydrate your skin, then look no further. Garnier is a brand I trust with my skincare.

I recommend this face wash to anyone that has sensitive skin, combination skin & is looking for a good deep clean without stripping your skin.

Title: Absolute junk
Review: DO NOT BUY. CANT GET REFUND FROM CHINA  TOTAL GARBAGE!! WISH I COULD GIVE IT NEGATIVE STARS

Title: Does not stay on well
Review: The soak off caps does not stay on well. Whenever I try to put it on my nails, it keeps sliding off like it is not even, and these did not work for me. I had gel manicure so I used the cotton ball soaked in acetone to remove the polish. It did not work and the clips also started to pinch a little when you put it on for too long.

Title: Great deal, good product, but not for working out.
Review: These sport bras are a good quality alternative to the expensive ones. I don't think they would hold you in place during a workout, but they provide good coverage. They are fine for around the house, but not recommended for workouts. The items are very comfy & provide light support. Great deal, good product!

Title: Size
Review: These pants were super cute but I bought them a size bigger and they were to small so I think they they run 2 to 3 sizes smaller than normal.

Title: Stinky!
Review: I was hoping for a nice lavender scent, but this is awful!  I suppose it's the bergamot, but whatever it is,  it's going in the trash can today.

Title: Looks nothing like the picture.  Cheaply made
Review: Tore up before I even got a chance to put it on the hair

Title: Great sturdy wallet for my biker
Review: Husband loves the fact its rfid. The wallet fits all cards and chain is a great length. Color is same as described. Highly recommend

Title: It’s warm and toasty.  What more could a gal want?
Review: I love this warm neck scarf.  Colorful, toasty and soft.  Am going to get a lot of use out of this charmer

Title: People find these butterfly barrettes fascinating…
Review: They are fine

Title: non skid socks
Review: They are non skid socks.. but the top elastic is a real fail.  Failing apart after one wash.  Eh.  I'm throwing them out because they just take of space in my sock drawer.  Honestly, I took the carpet out of my house and was worried about slipping on the new lament floor.  Turns out, that doesn't seem to be a problem.  I would spend a bit more and get a better quality non-skid if you need  them.

Title: HAND WASH ONLY??!!!! An ...
Review: HAND WASH ONLY??!!!! An outerwear item with laundering instructions of "Hand wash, cold water only".  Rough fabric, no fabric softener use either per label. Unfortunate choice.

Title: Update
Review: Gave them to my sister and she loved them, but there was a hard clump of material in the sole under her foot. She said she was just going to deal with it because it's hard to find booty style slippers, but they are wearing down too fast for only having them 1 1/2 months. Now, we have to buy new ones

Title: Works great for when your car doesn't have Bluetooth
Review: Works great for when your car doesn't have Bluetooth! The pandora and spotify come out pretty clear from my phone to the stereo.  Got it for almost $10 less than it was at walmart!

Title: Ok, but tight fit.
Review: Pretty good, but tight fit. Wish it was slightly looser

Title: Great device, really works!
Review: I had never tried a laser hair remover and I have to say I just love it!! I have been using this device for over a month now and the hair on my legs is all but gone. I have to admit I was a bit skeptical thinking I could only get results like this if I went to a professional salon, but I was greatly mistaken. This is super easy to use, I use it twice a week and the results are amazing. Highly recommend for everyone, I will save a ton on razors!

Title: What a great little gift this is for the ballerina/princess in your life!
Review: Cutest little set. The little girl I bought this for wore the outfit the first day during her visit here and then wore the tiara continuously thereafter (calling herself a princess, lol). Anyway, great inexpensive, quality outfit for the little one in your life.

Title: This sucks
Review: I have not a clue what these other reviewers are talking about. This product sucks so bad. It’s so patchy and horrible. It didn’t even lift light brown at all 💀. I had split dye so half was light brown and the other half was a dark brown almost black and it’s done patches on each side that are blonde/lighter but there’s still super dark spots in comparison to the spots it did lighten. I’m going to have to put a hat on and go buy dye to cover this 💩 job up holy hell

Title: I should have read the other reviews on here more closely
Review: Ok, so shoot me. I should have believed the other reviewers here. These earrings are much smaller than I thought they would be (almost hug the bottom of my ear lobe). I know the description says 'round' but the picture almost looked oblong. So, silly me, I bought them. At least there were at a gold box price when I got them (less than $15). but I will probably never wear them

Title: Smells wonderful, is intensely hydrating, and has SPF 30 (SEE UPDATE) Review: SEE UPDATE

At the current price of $14.99 this is wonderful. This cream is thick, smells wonderful, and is intensely hydrating. It also has SPF 30.

I slathered this all over my face and neck (but avoided the eye area), and it absorbed quickly and left my skin feeling super moisturized. I would definitely order this again. It is a perfect winter cream.

UPDATE July 18, 2022 - I've been using this religiously all summer and even put it on my boyfriend twice, since it is a face cream with SPF 30. We always avoid the eye area. Unfortunately, this sometimes somehow gets into the eyes and results in my eyes going bloodshot and being irritated. For my boyfriend, it was even worse, where he thought he had to go to a doctor. It looked like he had "pink eye" and he had trouble seeing. If it were not for this, this cream would be fantastic. Therefore, I am lowering my rating from 5 to 2 stars.

Title: Don't wear your makeup without it
Review: Makes my Maskcara highlight and contour go on like butter and keeps it on all day.  Game changer!!!  The make up is amazing without it, with it mind blowing.

Title: Great compact eye shadow set
Review: Super cute compact eye shadow. Fits perfectly in my handbag (or make up case) and makes it super convenient for mid-day touch ups. Great variety of colors, from light to darker for highlighting.  Lasts for several hours without needing reapplication. Some of the colors are lightly frosty, too, so makes my eyes pop with color. I really love this mini palette and I highly recommend to everyone.

Title: Halloween
Review: It was aight

Title: Very Nice
Review: Well made and sturdy enough for what it is intended for and this paisley matched my comforter for my bed perfectly. Ordered two more for family members. Excellent product and not overpriced!

Title: Lightweight moisturizer but am not crazy about the fragrance
Review: This moisturizer arrived with the top dislodge from the bottle. However, I was able to re-seat it and it works fine. For $25, there is only 10 ounces of product which is a lot of money. The moisturizer is lightweight and lightly hydrating; however, I do not like the smell. It is a strong and artificial smelling lemon/lime scent. Besides the strong scent, the price would prevent me from purchasing this.

Title: it's a scrub and it's pretty drying.
Review: It's not a cleanser; it's a scrub and it's pretty drying.

Title: Just the right size
Review: I buy shampoo and conditioner in gallon size containers, so I use the plastic bottles to make shower size containers.

Title: Order 2 sizes up!!
Review: I wear a XL so I bought a 2 XL because I read that the shirts run small. The 2 XL is the exact same size as an L, I came on here to let others know because I wish I would’ve known to go 2 sizes up!

Title: Cute
Review: A little itchy( well it is wool) and a bit tight( and we don’t have huge heads)

Title: Just what I needed
Review: I tried expensive compression socks and they were hard to get on and off.  Actually it took me and another person to remove those expensive compression socks.  These however are easy to put on and off, they are snug and comfortable on the feet and do the job well.  Great product.

Title: Nice quality
Review: Bought these for my mom and she loves them!

Title: 3ft mini usb cables
Review: I don't have many things that still use a mini USB charger cable, but I after a while you have to replace the charger cables.  These seem to work well and it was noted in the ad that they are reinforced at the head area to prolong life.  We shall see - time will tell.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  I do not accept any discounts or deals that are not available to all shoppers. And my reviews are based purely on my personal experience with each item I review.

Title: Total complete waste of money garbage
Review: Where is the option for minors stars? Unlike the other sellers they didn't include this so I ordered one but it won't be here until the end org the month.. big surprise. I've had this thing centimeters from the wet polish! Adam and surprise it does nothing.  I llost the company know.  Didn't offer a refunds so I bought garbage.  I'm willing to bet the end od March one does the same... nothing.  And don't look for helpful instructions I used google.  Really ticked off. Saying money on faulty products marks fire one unhappy customer!!!

Title: Under powered .. look elsewhere Review: Way under powered for my small 400 sqr ft space? I have a 14 year old 8" that produces more bass.
I had to keep putting my hand on it just to see if it was even on.
Look elsewhere

Title: Canceled
Review: Canceled the product this policy was to cover

Title: Yuk
Review: Coats hair ..I don't like it.. weighs it down doesn't mingle well

Title: Run long and WIDE. Review: I live on a river and thought these will be the perfect sandals for me!
These sandals seem sturdy and pretty well made.
If you have a wide foot these shoes are for you., but if you want to make the straps across the toes
Tighter, you cannot. There only for getting your foot in if you have wide feet.
I measured my foot from the chart, and ordered the 6 /12, these sandals run BIG, long for me, and are useless.
I usually wear between a 6 1/2 and a 7. I do have a narrow foot. Although can wear Regular width.
Also I asked before ordering if these run wide? The seller etc. never answered, now I know why!

These shoes are worthless to me, and will be giving them to the animal thrift store.

Title: Beautiful cross-body bag
Review: This is a fantastic cross-body bag. I was going n a weekend trip to visit my son in Los Angeles and knew this would be a great bag to use the minute I saw it. Beautiful, soft, well-made and functional, this bag has enough room for a wallet, makeup and small brush. I love that I can wear it across my body which helps protect me from someone looking to steal it. I also really like this light gray color, it goes with everything. I will definitely will be taking with me to Europe next year (hopefully this virus will be over by then). Highly recommend.

Title: Nice quality
Review: I have this as a gift to my son for his watch collection.  He loves it.  Nice quality.

Title: Hard to put on
Review: This bra is not true to size. Nice cotton but for someone with large breast, this will not work

Title: SAD PRODUCT Review: Thin, flimsy fabric...thread endings not clipped off (7" length). Fearful to wash as it probably won't hold up.
Chose XML but it will still be too small around the bottom. Style IDEA was great, it's unfortunate that it was manufacturered poorly from fabric chosen to pattern to manufacturing.

Title: Nice set of makeup and blending sponges but extremely overpriced
Review: This is a nice set of three makeup sponges for applying foundation or just blending. I particularly like the tiny sponge for precision work. Since they all have rounded bottoms, none of these sponges stand up on their own which is disappointing. Nevertheless, they are soft and as useful as every other similar type of blending sponge I have tried before. Unfortunately, the current price of $18.99 is OUTRAGEOUS as I can buy a set like this at my local store for about half the price which works just as well.

Title: ... and try to find an eye makeup remover as wonderful as Almay pads Review: Oh how I try and try and try to find an eye makeup remover as wonderful as Almay pads. This one is decent, but 1. messy and 2. doesn't work as well with long wear/waterproof eye makeup.
Good points are that it is moisturizing and does not irritate my sensitive eyes or leave an odd film on my contact lenses.

Title: Cream is fluorescent yellow & it stains; it lightly moisturizes; love the pump container
Review: There are only two things I like about this cream. First, it is lightly moisturizing. Second, I love the pump dispenser. However, I cannot stand any cream that has color to it and this one is fluorescent yellow. In addition, it stains (i.e. my tissues). After having tried this, I would never order it again. Had I known the cream was yellow, I would not have ordered it in the first place.

Title: Wished the actual picture was larger
Review: Bulky for what it is worth and the actual picture window is really small.  Easy to load up pictures and to use, but there are better functioning products out there for the money!

Title: rollers
Review: Perfect.  Just too big.  I need to pay attention to size next time

Title: Sounds is good but wearability is a challenge
Review: These have a good sound but the design is bulky and akward to wear. The wrap around the ear design is no longer needed unless you are doing some serious moving around. It’s says they are “waterproof”. The manual says IP65 which is not considered waterproof, more like water resistant. It pairs easily with my iPhone XS Max. Overall I’ve seen better value and designed wireless headset.

Title: headphones
Review: Purchased these as an Amazon "suggested" purchase with the kids metal detectors - come to find out that the detectors don't have a headphone jack.  Eh.  Not sure what I will do with them now.

Title: I like their foot balm better; this is thin and I do not care for the smell Review: There are two 3.38 fluid ounce tubes of foot cream in this package. The cream is thin and has a funny smell to it. It is supposed to be rose petals and shea butter but I do not care for the scent. I used this on my feet after a shower and although it is hydrating and silky, it is not as great as their balm, which I love.

I personally do not have very callused feet but they are dry and this is hydrating. I really wish I liked this as much as their [[ASIN:B08RSGFXR6 foot balm]]. I had my boyfriend try this as well and he likes the cream but also prefers the balm better.

The current price of $17.95 comes to $8.98 per tube.

Title: Cord got hot, will not reorder!!!
Review: Cord got hot. It was super hot to the touch. I threw away all these cords. I don't want my brand new phone to be damaged or a house fire!!

Title: Love this shoe
Review: Love this shoe, been purchasing for years now, fits great, great support.

Title: Does not work
Review: I have 2 fine lines on my cheek from sleeping on this face side. I should have known better that it would help, it did not help at all.

Title: flipflops with cloth tops
Review: Black bottoms, black cloth tops.  Flat.  Not very comfortable because the soles are so very flat and not super flex.  For me, Eh.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great Headphones, worth the purchase
Review: These headphones are awesome, they have a lot of bass and the music comes through clearly. connects to the Bluetooth easily, the fit is comfortable and not too tight.

Title: Sloppy eyeliner
Review: It is the hardest eyeliner I have ever tried to use.  Will never buy it.  Got in my birchbox.  Just looks sloppy.

Title: Cheap fabric
Review: Very thin and cheap fabric

Title: Good Capacity; seems quite fast
Review: What can you really say about a USB stick (flash drive)?  They either work or they don't.  This worked good, with what seemed like faster speed that a 2.0 version.  When plugged into a 3.0 USB port, it responded well.  Nice capacity too, as I would not buy anything less than 128GB these days, which is what this is.

Title: The 3/4 sleeve is actually a full tight fitting sleeve.
Review: Since I bought this shirt for the hot summer, I’m not very happy with my shirt.

Title: Excellent backpack for day trips or picnics.
Review: This is a large backpack. I intended to purchase something that would carry my lunch, my laptop, etc. for my work day at the office. This is appropriately sized to carry plenty.

Title: They're okay.
Review: Got these for my husband, he really likes the different colors and patterns, but the inside of the sock is where the quality starts to fall apart. The threads from all the patterns keep getting caught on his toes when he tries to put his feet inside them, which he reports is "super annoying". It isn't all the pairs, but several of them have this problem.

Title: Beautiful
Review: Beautiful barrette. Holds a lot of hair and does not pop open easily with thick hair. Also does not snag and break my hair.

Title: Awesome! Really work
Review: These work fantastic!  I'm amazed at how well they work considering they are a toy.  It is well made and adjustable.  If you want a real working set of binoculars for your little one, I recommend these!

Title: Not for me. Review: I’m not I love with it.
I’m more of a Coach chic.
The smell gave me a headache.

Title: Flimsy plastic
Review: Don’t bother. Flimsy plastic.

Title: Only 3 stars
Review: Good price for what it is. Won’t display notifications for texts but notifications for calls come up. I had to go thru a lot just to set it up u have to download an app. Doesn’t stay connected sometimes no matter how close the phone is.

Title: Nice shoes but too wide for my foot
Review: They were wider than previous Puma I bought.  Returned shoe for credit

Title: Three Stars
Review: Cheap. You get what you pay for. Not high quality. But I still wear them occasionally to work.

Title: Perfect Review: I use a white eyeliner daily on my upper lid... I used to Philosphy white liner, however they no longer make it. I have tried about 6 different brands from $8 to $50 dollars... they streaked.. they ran... they didn't stay on.. Until these. Great price, great function. I'm going to try other Rimmel products.
UPDATE... Okay... after using for a few weeks, I will add, I STILL love it... The crayon glides on.. stays on for a reasonable amount of time...isn't clumpy. Yep. It was a good purchase.

Title: They work for a while
Review: Like a lot of "mfi certified" cables, these worked for a while until they didn't work any more.

Title: Cute but don’t stay on my feet
Review: The slippers are darling and soft but they don’t stay on my feet like they should.  Perhaps that’s just this design?

Title: It’s ok..
Review: The print and color is just like the pictures. I washed it in gentle cycle inside a laundry bag,  dried it, removed it from dryer immediately upon completion... so so so many wrinkles and the color fads after one wash. I love the color and style. However, the ponytail pouch is shaped weirdly. If I roll my hair in a bun, I can't get it into the ponytail pouch.  It took some effort to push my hair in little by little. The entry area is stretchy but small. I wore it to work today; had to constantly reposition the cap. It will not stay in place, keeps on slipping back. My hair inside the pouch does not stay in place either. I had to retuck it in 2x over an 8 hr shift. I find it inconvenient. I don't like to touch or expose my hair at work because I'm always caring for sick patients. This cap defeats the purpose of protection. Such a waste of money.

Title: Does not work with a samsung phone
Review: Does not fit a samsung but says it does.

Title: NOT WOOD! Made of cheaper materials than promised in listing.
Review: NOT WOOD! I paid more for this than entry level trunks due to the promise of wood construction. It arrived with a fist size hole that allowed me to see it has cardboard, or thin MDF construction. Why pay double, when the construction is no different? I hate being lied to.

Title: Read the product description carefully
Review: The name of the product is Attache 3.  This DOES NOT mean it is USB 3.  Don't make the same mistake I made.

Title: Look great but don't last long
Review: Easy to put on, look great - lots of compliments but only last a couple days... I prefer the NAIL OG brand

Title: Pathetic Review: If I had a choice I would not order again.
Thank GOD they were not for wedding!
Cheap, flimsy, missing rhinestones (beads) , clasp did not work.....

Title: it's an Old Spice fragrance, great for short hair
Review: It is definitely old spice that you can tell, which can be a negative if you dont like the brand fragrance.  it did the job, but it did have a slight shine to it if you prefer a matte look then this night not be what you want.  it works well and kept the hair in place for the whole day, and that was applied to very short hair.  It does not leave any stickiness.

Title: Really cleanses / strips my hair; I would not use this more than once per week
Review: First of all I do not like the tin bottle because it marks up my acrylic tub with gray stains. Second, I hate having to unscrew a cap to get to the shampoo. It does pour out easily. The creamy white shampoo lathers pretty well and really cleanses. However, it feels like it is stripping my  hair. I will only use this when my hair needs a good cleansing. At the current price of $22, I would never buy this. The bottle it comes in and the detergent-like cleanse is just too much to handle.

Title: Nice large suitcase, basic functionality, lightweight but high priced
Review: Nothing much more to add to other reviews here. It took me a while to even figure out how to open this suitcase (despite the fact that the lock was set to 0000. However, after about 15 minutes of working on it, I finally realized there was a button to slide. Inside there are two large pocket areas and the rest is open (with secure straps to keep your clothing in place). It is a 29" size, prides itself on being large. I found it to be adequate when compared to my Travelpro luggage (I think they have far more pockets, even small ones where I can put toiletries which this does not have). The biggest plus is the fact that it is lightweight (so I know I will be able to zip through the airport). Wheels are multi-directional and it is easy to maneuver. Biggest issue to me is the price, but I know there are people out there who love the designer products but over $500 for this suitcase is too high. I haven't tried to reset the lock yet. I see there are some videos out there on You Tube so I will play around with that later.

Title: Palette: present. Spatula: MIA.
Review: Although I received the palette with no problem, the spatula is missing. Defeats the entire purpose. Contacting Amazon for replacement.

Title: Functional blush brush w/no bristle shedding; would have preferred longer bristles & heavier handle Review: This is a basic angled blush brush. It works well for applying powder blush. The brush feels great in my hands--although I do wish it had a silicone grip on it and a heavier handle. The bristles do not shed and the head provides decent coverage. I do wish the bristles were just a little bit longer and that the bristles were a little softer. In general, this is a basic but functional foundation brush.

The current price of $18.99 for the quality of this brush is about $10 overpriced, in my opinion.I would have expected a higher quality handle and much softer bristles at that price.

Title: love this
Review: i got this because im disabled and have bad knees  hard to walk and im afraid of falling so i carry this around when i get up with my house phone in it  in case i fall  and need assistance (and hope im conscious enough to dial 911)  but it has an amazing amount of pouches and openings  for other things as well  it makes me feel a bit safer in my 1000 sq ft condo  all the others i looked at were just big enough for a cell phone but i wanted to put my house phone in it

Title: Love!
Review: Super comfortable. Stylish. Like it so much, I bought it in multiple colors.

Title: Not great
Review: Strap at toe is very rough and scraped the skin between my toes

Title: so I could handle that because they're all pretty. But
Review: Purchased this purse several months ago. First, I had ordered the green, but was sent the black. Ok, so I could handle that because they're all pretty. But, what a smell!!  It smells horrible of musty, moldy, have aired out since I received it with scented dryer sheets and hanging outside. Still smells. So, it was too late to return, I liked the purse so I purchased it in the original green one. Thank goodness this one doesn't smell. You just don't know what you're getting.

Title: Wonderfully fragrant soap that cleans & lathers well but avoid washing certain areas; pricey Review: There is a warning on this package that this is not to be applied on eyes, ears, mouth, and genitals but the Amazon site says this is good for jock itch. Then it says if "wipes" contact these areas, rinse promptly and thoroughly with water. Also, the box says to apply the soap to the skin and allow it to stay on the skin for several minutes. With all these warnings, I would never order this again. Nevertheless, I love this soap.

This bar has tea tree oil in it, which gives it its antifungal properties. However,  it does not smell medicinal like tea tree oil. It smells wonderful. It cleans and lathers well also.  The current price of $8.99 is pricey for this small bar.

Title: male to male svga cable
Review: great item for the price; already had in mind how I was going to run cable: works like a charm

Title: If you need it to record something important, don't bother.
Review: I was using this on my bike helmet.  One needs a bike helmet to show what actually happened in accidents, or even near accidents.  This would record in clips, but 1/4 through and sometimes 1/2 through, it would just freeze.  There was a couple of times I needed the clips but could not use them because of the freezing.  So I returned this.

Title: I return this
Review: Watch didn't turn on when I raised my hand up, I didn't get notifications and for a few extra dollars I was able to get a refurbished galaxy 3 that does all that and more. The battery life was great because all it did was tell time if I pushed the button. I couldn't even get the pedometer to work. Not user friendly.  I bought this because of all the good reviews. I was very disappointed.

Title: Behaved more like a conditioner than a shampoo.
Review: Given enough oil and butter to a product: my fizz hair will behave itself.  I wasn't in love with it as a shampoo as it laid heavy and I certainly did not add any conditioner.  I felt this item behaved more like a conditioner than a shampoo.  If you have color treated her - this might be sufficient as the only product you use on your hair.  I would recommend using this product once a week and not daily.

Title: TINY
Review: These are cute ... but super petite.  They are a little more than 1/4 inch wide.

Title: kids camera
Review: Arrived used!!  - missing the sd chip and thumb drive.  SUPER disappointing as it was a christmas gift and now I can't get another before the time I needed.  Also... it is a really awkward to use --- the buttons didn't respond ( probably why it had been returned) had to keep pushing them.  Just junk.  I would not recommend purchasing this item or from these people.

Title: Tight Cuff Band Requires Skinny Legs Review: I love the way these K. BELL WOMEN’S SOFT AND DREAMY CREW SOCKS (3 Pack, size 9-11) feel on my feet, but I don’t have the skinny legs you need to wear them. The socks go about halfway up my legs, and the top cuff band is far too tight for comfort. I had to fold the socks down to make anklets, to be able to wear them at all. (I’m NOT overweight, but have sort of fat calves—12-1/2” around at the point where the sock cuffs hit.)

The 3-pack consists of one pair of navy socks with dots (very cute), and two pairs of jet black socks. They’re easy care socks—machine wash cold, no chlorine bleach, tumble dry low.

Aside from the circulation-strangling cuffs, this 3-pack contains no fewer than 6 of those horrid clear nylon hangtag-attachers that need to be cut off so carefully. It’s a challenge to NOT cut the sock fabric, and to keep from dropping a piece of the attacher on the floor (where bare feet will surely find it, painfully, if you can’t see where it dropped).

Title: Nicely scented but the this face wash is more of a gel and does not produce a lather Review: I love trying, using, and purchasing men's products because I tend to like them more. This face wash has a nice fragrance but I do not like it because it has a thick viscosity like a gel that produces absolutely no lather. I just do not feel like I cleaned my face after using this.

On the other hand, I love their [[ASIN:B0748G11ZG face moisturizer]].

UPDATE October 30, 2017: My boyfriend tried this and did not care that the soap us thick. He said it does not lather well but it cleans well. He rates this 2 stars because he does not see the point of this for a man. He says it is another step in a busy day when he can just wash his face as part of a shower.

Title: We measured- still too big
Review: We think their measurements are off because these are too big for our boat speakers.

Title: Nice shampoo/conditioner combo; don’t like that bottles look like juice drinks Review: This is a nice shampoo and conditioner set. The shampoo lathers pretty good but not excellent. The conditioner leaves my hair nourished and tame. I like the fragrance when I smell it in the bottle but during use it smells different and not as pleasant.

What I do not like is that the bottles look like juice drinks. I can see someone making a mistake and thinking this is a food item.

In summary, I like the results on my short, fine curly hair but not enough to order this again. It would have to smell more fragrant and the shampoo would have to lather better.  I personally prefer the TRESemmé Keratin Smooth combo more.

Title: Smoothing—Not Controlling—Panty
Review: This VANITY FAIR WOMEN’S SMOOTHING COMFORT ILLUMINATION BRIEF PANTY (13263) features an extra spandex panel in front to help smooth the tummy.  The spandex does NOT offer firm control—what control there is, is barely there, and the smoothing or slimming effect is minimal.  However, it’s a nice panty.

Title: It won't last long
Review: The sewing is not the best. You can see some glue for the partions. Cheaply made. White powder stuff on the inside. Partions are bent on the lower level. Lock doesn't open seamlessly.

Title: Similar to a regular dish sponge except it feels like gel; hanging loop is a thread; too pricey Review: This is mildly exfoliating until its fully wet. It's really just a sponge that feels almost similar to a regular Ocelo kitchen sponge. The only difference is that the consistency feels more rubbery or "gel-like." This holds a lot of water but it does not lather any better than a regular sponge. What I absolutely hate is the cheap thread going through the sponge that one can use to hang it. The thread is so cheap, that it reminds me of sewing thread and will definitely break easily.

The current price of $13.25 is outrageous for this sponge in my opinion. I personally do not like anything but the color. After having tried this, it will be repuprosed as a not-so-good kitchen sponge.

UPDATE 5/11/2021 - I threw this sponge out two days ago. I felt like I was washing with jelly. It has a disgusting feel to me that I just could not use this anymore. I tried using this as a dish sponge but I also could not stand it for that.

Title: Disappointed
Review: Not very accurate in tracking steps taken.  Wrist band started coming off after 3 months of use.

Title: Not worth it
Review: Cord is too short, does not charge a kindle, will not charge iPhone.  I gave as Christmas gifts.  Everyone disappointed.

Title: Sheer luxury for your face!
Review: This is one of the best skin cremes I have ever used. Yes, it is expensive. But this is one of the times I can honestly say you get what you pay for. A little goes a long way, this should last you for months, so it is well worth it. Goes on rich and luxurious, absorbs super quick into your skin. I use it immediately after I shower to lock in moisture and I can say for the few months I have been using it now, my skin looks and feels fresher and softer. I love the fragrance and the way it applies. I can highly recommend this IS Clinitcal creme to anyone with 40+ skin. Minimizes wrinkles, adds moisture back to aging skin and makes your skin glow and feel wonderful. Takes years off your face!

Title: great size
Review: excellent for cleaning eye glasses

Title: Way overpackaged for a gift; decent lather & cleansing wash w/subtle fragrance Review: My first impression of this set was not good. It comes in a box three times the size of the product with a lot of black paper padding. If a man were receiving this as a gift, I think he would be expecting more product and be a bit disappointed. There are two body washes and two beard/hair washes in this box. If I removed all the packaging I could fit three sets in this box.

The washes and hair washes are all the same. The fragrance is subtle. I used the hair wash on my hair and it really cleans with moderate lather. The same with the body wash. The results of both items do not blow me away. The washes are just okay but the packaging is a big negative. Also, the current price of $16.99 is a bit much for this ensemble. At this price, it comes to $4.25 per travel-sized bottle.

Title: Not for Coolpix S3500
Review: Have to give it three stars because I honestly can't say how it is. I purchased a Nikon S3500 camera and below the item, the battery was included in the "Customers who bought this item also bought..." Since my camera was the S3500, I assumed it was the right battery because it said it worked in a Nikon 3500. Nope. Too big and the contacts are wrong. I gave three stars only because I've had Nikon products before and they were always good.

Title: Silicone head too wobbly for scrubbing; needs 1 AA battery; vibration not enough Review: I am disappointed in this sonic facial cleaner. One AA battery is needed (NOT INCLUDED). I was able to easily unscrew the bottom cap to insert the battery; although it seems other users have issues with that. Once the battery is installed, operation is simple. I just pressed the center button and a tiny light (see photo) and a continuous but subtle vibration begins. The button can be pressed again for a change in vibration and again for what feels like a stop / start vibration.

I do find this difficult to use because the arm and head bend easily, so it is almost impossible to get any scrubbing action since the wand does not stay tight to the face.

The "mirror-looking" side is supposed to be used to gently massage wrinkle-prone skin but I have no interest in doing that. It is cooling though.

Unfortunately, I do not care for this facial cleansing brush. The arm needs to be stiffer to hold the brush head against my face. Also, the current price of $24.99 is ridiculous for this. Even if it were an excellent brush, I feel anything more than $10 is too much.

Title: Adequate for Personal Use
Review: I ordered these containers to store some shea butter cream that I wanted to make. These containers look a lot like ones that high end skin products come in, but they are lighter weight & not as sturdy. They are more than adequate for my own personal use, however, I would not use these if I were selling or gifting my home made creams.

Title: Not strong as I hoped
Review: Not as strong picking up signals as I was led to believe. I have 11 stations.

Title: Awesome
Review: Great price,  I get it at my door in a few days .  Awesome 😎

Title: Nice size; accommodate most cables
Review: These work quite well and the opening is large enough to accommodate fairly large cables.  The only problem is trying to get the nail started that holds them, but that's not really the fault of the product, although they could have use just a tiny bit longer nails.  They served their purpose for me and you can reuse them.

Title: Comfort needs work Review: This is a great idea and I love mine. HOWEVER, if you have any type of headaches or cannot stand something on your forehead, this isn’t for you.
The control area can definitely use some advances, it pushes into your forehead a bit and after just a short time can become very annoying.
I wouldn’t sleep in them and unfortunately that’s what I bought them for. For travel they would be great, couple hours, something such as this.
I wouldn’t “gift” this item, although a great idea and concept, some people just can’t wear this version.
I think they offer a version that has the controls on the side. Maybe opt for that one instead.

Review: Very easy to use and they come in different colors.

Title: Dorco razors
Review: Love these razors, good quality at a good price, nice smooth shaved, no tugging and lasts a long time, highly recommend!

Title: Another great Garnier product!
Review: I typically use Brazilian Blow Out as my shampoo/conditioner of choice in order to maintain my quarterly keratin treatments for as long as possible. I figured I would try this new Garnier product and I have to say I am pleasantly suprised. First, the fragrance is amazing. Second,  the fact that is ti s paraben-free and contains vitamins B3 & B6 are just icing on the cake. My hair looks smooth, taming the frizzies and it feels and smalls amazing. I have also ordered the shampoo (although I have not yet received it to review), but I am thrilled with this conditioner. In addition, it is probably 25% of the cost of Brazilian Blow Out. So, if the shampoo works out as well as the conditioner, this will now be my go-to hair treatment going forward. A great product at a reasonable cost.

Review: Quality of fabric is good. Super cute; bonnet matched the dress. Armpit area fits strange though.  Can only wear it if I don’t want to use my arms. Ha.

Title: Not What I Expected
Review: This exfoliating gel was not at all what I expected. I am a fan of Sonage products. Their Botanica Souffle cream is my absolute favorite day time face cream. This comes in a tube. The product is a clumpy gel. I liked the smell of it. It has an invigorating menthol smell to it. When I spread it on my face, there were clumps of product scattered around my skin. I let it set for a couple of minutes, then rubbed it off. I've used it a couple of times so far and I haven't decided if I like it or not. I haven't used anything like it before. It's not abrasive and I haven't had any negative reactions to it which is a plus. I have sensitive skin and it hasn't been irritated by it. Luckily it's a small tube and I won't have to deal with it for long. I think I will stick with my usual exfoliators.

Title: Not too impressive

Title: Product not as advertised; bowl and wooden handled razor is missing; cheap razor is substituted Review: I was supposed to receive a shaving bowl and wooden handled razor with this set. Instead I got no bowl and the razor is metal without any wooden handle. The shaving brush is okay, but also not as pictured. Also, there's a leather strap for sharpening the razor that is included in the one I received but is not supposed to be included in the one advertised. The leather case is similar but also not the same.

The razor is sharp and does cut beard hair but it seems cheaply made. I just do not feel this razor will last long. This set is a disappointment both from the perspective of not being what I ordered and the razor not seeming to be high-quality.

Title: Too wide and loose; comfortable once I removed the tag & wear socks or arch support Review: I take a size 9-10 shoe in women's and a 7.5 to 8M in men's. These slippers are good in the length but they are entirely too wide making them very loose. They also have a tiny tag at the arch, which I had to cut out (see third photo). This tag is super irritating if not wearing socks. However, socks or some insert is required since they are too big. Otherwise they are very comfortable and warm.

The instructions (first photo) says that these can be spot cleaned or machine washed in cold and either line dried or tumble dried on low.

If these fit better and did not have that irritating tag right at the arch, I would have rated these 5 stars.

Title: Cotton is not real soft, Son wears a 32 jeans these fit good. Review: Size medium.

Fruit of the Loom has been around forever it seems. Although allot has changed over the years.

My husband would not wear these, he wears low rise underwear.
These fit with the longer legs, and my two boys wear this type.
One of the boys tried them on, and won’t wear these, there not comfortable. The cotton is not soft.( he wears designer silk briefs).
The other boy is slimmer, and wears a 32 in jeans, and likes these. Although Both wear a medium in briefs, the older one is
Bigger and wears a size 33 to 34 in jeans. That said my husband wears a 32 in jeans. These did fit him, but he
Doesn’t like this type of briefs!
Gave sizes to give a idea if they will fit others.

There is 7 briefs in the package, in gray, and black, and if you like these , there great for the price.
They seemed to shrink when I took them out of the dryer..I used dryer sheets, and still not real soft, but these do hold
You inn where it’s impotant at my son said. .There is No tags which is a plus. The waist band is comfortable. Sewed well.

Title: Definitely dusts, but SUPER LOUD. Review: Outta the box, the duster is unbalanced. The weight is toward the nozzle, and the plastic feels brittle. Not sure how long this duster will last me.

In any case, it works very well for what it's made: dusting my desk and other surfaces. The dust clears away far more than using compressed air. There are two settings, low and high. Usually low is enough. However, I can't stand using this for a while because it's sufferingly loud. My cat runs away whenever I turn this on. Honestly, it's almost as loud as my vacuum cleaner. I took it to my office and use it only for about 5 seconds. Also, because it's unbalanced, it becomes very heavy at the top and awkward to move when dusting.

Title: Acts more like a toner; bottle does not dispense well; hence rating Review: Even though this is an oil it feels more like a toner on my skin. After washing my face, I applied a couple of drops of this to a cotton round, and it feels cleansing but also tightens my face after using this. The only issue I had is that it took over one minute of pounding this jar on my counter upside into the cotton round for me to get two drops of this product to use. Until they fix the issues with dispensing this from the bottle, I cannot recommend this. Had I not had this problem, this would have received 5 stars from me.

The current price of $31.99 is competitively priced.

Title: It's OK, battery life not so great
Review: It's an OK camera, battery life was great for about 6 mon5hs, now it's meh at beat, has to be charged twice a week with very little transmit or recording time, the camera is offline most of the time. Does not sync with alexa despite amazon and blink saying it does, you spend hours online with support to be told the system is obsolete and you have to roll backwards to get it to even work with the blink sync module, if you can get it to connect at all..  all ib all if this is your only camera you'd do OK, but if you have a multi camera system go with Ring or a real security cam setup

Title: Shockingly wonderful socks; moderate compression in arch; loose around ankle area; too $$$ Review: These socks feel great on. They have moderate compression in the arch which helps with plantar fasciitis. However, they are loose around the ankle area which is perfect for those who have diabetes. They are rated for neuropathy, plantar fasciitis, diabetes, vaular conditions, cold feet, edema, and arthritis.

I have plantar fasciitis and it moderately helps with this. These also keep my feet warm and they are very comfortable to wear. These socks are also moderately thick, which is a plus. I have no idea how these will hold up over time, but I love these socks more than I expected to. I wash these in a lingerie bag in my washer and lay them flat to dry. 

Unfortunately, at the current price of $24.99, their pricing is outrageous for one pair of these. If they priced these at $10.95 or less, I would have rated them 5 stars.

Title: Cheaply made, loose threads, thin & scratchy
Review: Title says it all, really. It's thin, it's a very loose knit, there are loose threads everywhere... it's on the wider side so it won't stay up over your nose or keep your neck warm, although wearing it as a hood, around your head,  or as balakava is ok. It's more expensive than and less nice than similar products from other brands. Washing it did make it a bit softer, but I have no idea how a reputable brand that is so popular can also be so cheap and poorly made.

The sponge is mildly exfoliating due to the rough exterior. However, I find these sponges difficult to wash with because they are bigger than my hand. For me this is a big disappointment. Also, the current price of $9.99 is an expensive $5 per sponge.

Title: My favorite top
Review: This is a great top! I have 4 of them in assorted colors. Great with leggings or skinny jeans. Super comfortable and thin enough to wear over a tee. I get a lot of compliments on it!  It also hides a lot if you are thicker in the middle! Transitions great into fall with some skinny jeans and boots. Fabric is a waffle weave on the thinner side. Cute loose mock turtleneck. I love it!

Review: I like the color and fabric "feel".  Washed well.  It is a tighter fit than others I've bought that are the same size.  It is a "slim" fit.

Title: Pump bottle DOES NOT pump; shampoo is very nice but if I can’t get to it, forget it Review: I hate nothing more than a product that either does not work or that I cannot get to. The pump on this bottle never opens and I tried three different times for over 20 minutes. I absolutely HATE this.

I had to remove the top to pour it out of the bottle. As a shampoo, it has a nice fragrance and lathers and cleans well. I have fine curly hair and my hair dried without relaxing the curls too much, so that was nice. As a shampoo it gets 4 stars but being able to get to the product gets 0 stars and the high $27 price 1 star--hence the 2-star rating.
