Title: Amazon 3D HDMI cable Review: Price, Price, Price
easy to use, works as well as the high priced HDMI cable (1.3) given to me when I purchased my playstation3.
Knowing when I purchased my LG 3D TV and 3D player I needed a new cable I went w/ 2 new Amazon and one mediabridge for all my toys.
1. although not the best option when hanging your tv on the wall, amazon cables worked much better than the mediabridge. getting the TV up closer (snug) to the wall.
2. cable is more pliable and easier to work with.
3. reception thru player worked flawlessly so far for 3D. going to test it further today only a better 3D disk.
4. price was excellent. even compared to monoprice's cables.

After two years, these cables have been excellent.
Ordered two more for the additional DirecTV hookups.

Title: electric nail file
Review: Purchased this for my 80 year old mom... it is difficult for her to file her toenails (yes, she insists in doing them herself) and this has really made her life easier.  I did make an extra purchase for replacement heads and it was disappointed to see I had to buy all four separate heads instead of the ONE we really wanted.  But I did purchase them.  She won't use the buffing heads so they are just tossed in the garbage.  The file heads do exactly as you hope - file and reduce the length of nails.  Mom finds it easy to hold onto and control the head to do a good job filing and finishing.  It is rechargable and charges up quickly.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Also, I could not get a good line to use this effectively as a template. The silicone is too thick. If I made it too loose the edges just came up on either side and it did the same even if I made it tight (see photo). It was a complete fail for me.

The price is also too expensive for this. Also, slight assembly is required by feeding the strap into the silicone channel.

Title: Great camera for the money - good, solid features
Review: I want to begin by saying I own a Canon Rebel which I love and use all the time. I wanted to get a second camera which also took great pictures but that was lower priced and better for me to take on extended travel without all my lenses). The Fujifilm FinePix is a good camera. For around the $200 price range, you get a high quality camera with good picture taking quality (14 MP, EVF, 30 times zoom capability). It is easy to learn and use and makes an excellent entry level camera with high quality features (would make a great graduation gift for a high schooler to introduce them to a higher level of picture taking than a simple point and shoot). It is a little large and plasticy, but overall I do recommend it for a good second camera or, as I mentioned, to someone looking to enter the SLR market (but not ready to spend $600+).

The fabric is softer than I expected and does not scratch or itch. The bottoms fit lower on me than the picture shows. There's an obvious tag which I had in the back, but it felt like it was on backwards. I wanted to keep pulling it up in the back. The top is adjustable. There's not a lot of support for my 40DD size, but they fit alright. I don't think I could comfortably wear this underneath clothes, but for at home, it's fine. My husband did like it!

Title: Super nice speaker for your laptop
Review: Got this speaker (Logitech USB Laptop Speaker Z305) for my Mac to amp up the sound during movies ... and just love it.  It attaches super easily, has great sound, easy-access on/off, and volume controls on the speaker which are readily accessible while it's on the pc.  Highly recommend.  Please note that I purchased this in 2011 when the price was $39.99 (just noticed Dec 29, 2012 price is now over $100!)

Title: Cheaply Made Mouse Review: I bought this mouse because the shape mimicked the Microsoft mouse I've been using with my desktop PC for ages. I recently purchased my first laptop and I wasn't sure I was going to like using the trackpad. The mouse is pretty cheaply made of thin and brittle plastic. There isn't even a storage space for the USB receiver it was shipped loose, rattling about in the battery compartment.

The mouse works. It fits my thick, stubby fingered hand okay. It's affordable as something to throw in the laptop bag in case you need a mouse for something quick and infrequent. If you're going to be using a mouse all the time you might want to invest in something a little better than this.

Title: Watch is Huge, has allot of different functions. Review: My First impress when I opened the nice box this watch comes in Was, Omg, this is a Huge, Big, Thick, watch with a nice thick Leather band.

This watch comes with many functions. Chronograph , Date, Timer, etc. Its water Resistant up to 330 ft.. Not a divers watch.
Read the book this comes with this before wearing it. Its not your common everyday watch.

This is a battery run watch.

My Son is a private pilot , and Loves this Watch to wear when flying and for everyday.
He is 6 ft. As others have said here, there bigger men, but I think if this watch is what you want,
Buy it and enjoy Wearing it.
Although if you have a slim wrist this is not going to be comfortable for you,

I personally think its Big, kind of Flashy, but then again, it has allot going for it.
The watch will be the first thing you notice when someone is wearing it.

We have other Invicta Watches, and they always keep Very good time, and everything has always function on them, and last a long time.

I gave this a 3 star, because it is so big, and not for everyone.

Title: Produces brown lather; feels exfoliating & moisturizing but I had to it throw out - SEE UPDATE Review: SEE UPDATE BELOW

After trying this, this is not a soap that I would order again. The main reason is because I do not care for the brown colored lather that comes off of the soap. The bar does feel exfoliating and I found it to be moisturizing in the sense that it took a bit to wash off because my skin felt oily. It is okay but is not for me. The list price of $9 is pricey too; however, the current price with the 35% discount comes to a competitively priced $5.85 per bar.

UPDATE - Even though I kept this soap on a silicon brush that drained the liquid, it kept breaking apart and became a soppy mess. This soap breaks off into little pieces that kept going down the drain. I had to throw it out. I absolutely hate this soap.

Title: Way too big
Review: I want to give this more stars because I love the style and skirt pattern but it is so big! My 10 month old is wearing 12 month clothes comfortably but the 12-18 month is huge and could fit a 2 year old. I attached a picture of the 12-18 month and the 18-24 month sizes to show that they are very similar in size. Disappointed!

Title: Very Nice
Review: Exactly what I was looking for in a summer robe.  I received it quickly which I was pleased with as I needed it to attend an over night sleep study.  The only problem is that the robe has a small tear (about 1/4 inch) on near the left shoulder, front and it's noticeable.  I didn't have time to return it as the sleep study is this week so I washed it, washes well.  I'll see if someone can sew up that area later on though it will leave a noticeable mark.  So be careful and check out your robe when you open the package and don't wait as I did for needing it ASAP.  Thanks.

Title: GREAT IF YOU WANT TO STAY ORGANIZED!
Review: So far, I like this purse a lot.  I have no negatives to report so far.  I like to have different pockets & zippered areas to put things in because I don't like to have all the stuff I carry in one pocket.  That way it's easier to find things and keep things organized.  It's great!

Title: This eye serum is wonderful but I do not like the smell - SEE UPDATE Review: This eye serum is wonderful but I do not like the smell. It is clear like aloe vera gel. I put it on my lids and under my eye and my eye area felt extremely supple and smooth and incredibly hydrated. It was almost like I had a silky barrier on my lids. It is very nice indeed. Unfortunately, I am not crazy about the smell and I can't describe it. If it were not so good, I would not use this. However, because the results are terrific, I'll use it despite the smell.

The current price of $39 is pricey for this .05 ounce tube, but a little goes a long way.

UPDATE: I've been using this for over one week and my eyelids are itchy and one became swollen. This is very disappointing as I really love this gel. Once I stopped this, the itchiness went away. When I went back, it started again. Apparently, I am allergic to the ingredients which is very disappointing.

Title: Super great shimmer lip balm!
Review: I have been using some sort of a 'chapstick' for years (starting from when I was a kid). My opinion used to be that it is used for when either it's very cold and dry out or if your lips are just overly chapped. Since I found this new Nivea Shimmer Lip variety, I am now using it daily as part of a makeup routine. It is light and shiny and makes my lips look super natural but with a shine.  Instead of a 'regular' lipstick/lip gloss, this Nivea aid keeps my lips soft and smooth at all times and gives me the added benefit of being like a lip gloss. I highly recommend this to anyone with dry, chapped lips or anyone who just wants to look their best (while doing good for skin).

Title: Nice and handy
Review: Even though this is a small handheld light it's still very bright for The size.It has different modes That you can use. Fits very well on a keychain. Small enough to keep in your car for emergencies as well.

Title: Nice fit, a little big in the waist. Review: Love these! They are a bit big in the waist but that is because I have a big booty. To fit the booty, the waist is big. I have found that the Levis 529 fit better around the waist for bigger booties, but with a belt, these fit nice.

I love the stretchy fabric, yet slim fit on the legs.

Title: Good price
Review: I thought the funnel shaped ear buds would be excellent, not so much. They don't stay in my tiny ears. They just pop right out. The small size round ones are still the best. Oh well. Good price.

Title: Scentless, barely rejuvenating gel; no English instructions; pricey Korean skin care - 2.5 stars
Review: Korean skin care products are usually very good. However, this scentless gel that comes in a pump bottle is barely rejuvenating. I used this on my face and neck after a shower. It absorbed quickly and my skin felt smooth and subtly soft but after a few hours and the next morning, my face felt on the dry side. It's okay but nothing great. At the current price of $45.99, this should be sensational. Also, the package has most of the writing in Korean and, except for warnings, there are absolutely no English application instructions.

Title: micro touch personal trimmer
Review: I purchased this for my husband to tame his very bushy mustache and eyebrows.  He reports it works well and for ear hair.  Eh.  Having said this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Stiff vinyl backside with zipper closes the back of shoe against the heel which is unacceptable. Review: Have not tried on when product was received.
Too difficult to manage and not what it appeared in picture. Was expecting "Slip-on" flexible shoe. This is NOT!!

Title: Sucked
Review: Way to narrow for me

Title: manufacture defect
Review: Strap between toes on left sandal was off about an inch according to the right sandal. Which made the strap around ankle off and no room for the big toe.

Title: Dries fast, But polish chipped fast! Review: I thought for the first couple of days this was a great Base Coat..
Now on the morning of the 3rd day my nails started to chip!..Btw, I put a OPI top coat over my polish every night, and my polish would look fresh and shiny for at least a week..Even though I garden without gloves sometimes, and do the dishes etc.

When I put on the top coat, I put it under my nails, then the tip, then over the whole nail. It would seal my
natural Nail for a week a least, as I said..
I usually have to do a new manicure cause the polish is growing out.
I DON'T keep my nails real long.

I gave Essie first base coat the benefit of the doubt, with a 3 star! Needless to say, I'm disappointed..

Title: Five Stars
Review: Been using this product for years & I love it!

Title: One is not the flavor advertised; I also only liked one of the three balms Review: This is a very nice set of three lip balms in a round tin that is marked $6 (via a sticker) for resale. It might be geared toward kids but I got them for me because I love fun flavors. The balm goes on smoothly and is moisturizing. I felt like it provided a nice hydrating barrier on my lips.

There are three flavors and I tried all of them but only liked the candy cane. The other two tasted horrible and burnt. The Amazon site says that the flavors are gingerbread, caramel, and candy cane. There is no caramel. Instead it is butterscotch.

The current price of $4.98 is pricey for this especially when it is marked $6 for retail; otherwise this is a reasonable price if one loves the flavors. I do love that it comes with its own storage tin.

Title: Great for large apron bellies and little feet
Review: Such an odd cut. Levi must assume that everyone who is a size 18 also has a large apron belly, large butt, and tiny feet. Just saing, men's jeans fit better, which is unusual.

Title: Poor quality
Review: I put it on for the first time and it broke....I ordered 2, I for my grand daughter and one for myself. I sent them both back even tho I never gave it to her. I didn't want her to be disappointed....

Title: Toenail clippers defective but workable; rest of set is okay – 2.5 stars Review: This set comes with a toenail clipper, a nail clipper, and an oblique or angled clipper. The cutting edge on all are good. However, the toenail clipper spring action arm shot out of the unit on first try and could have hit me in the eye. I tried to reseat the arm but it shot out again. The one arm on the clipper is not manufactured correctly; however, it can be used with only one arm as long as the arm is put toward the top as shown in my photo.  The nail files on the other clippers are also good.

In addition to the three nail clippers, there are also three other implements that I do not know how to use. One is supposed to lift an ingrown toenail.

At the current price of $15.19 ($15.99 minus 5%), this set is not worth the price due to the poor quality of the toenail clippers. If everything worked, this would be a nice basic set.

Title: GOOD ITEM.
Review: WORKS AS PROMISED. . .GOOD ITEM. . .

Title: Five Stars
Review: comfortable!

Title: I love the shampoo, but you can’t find it in stores
Review: I love the shampoo and conditioner problem is you can’t pick it up in the store you have to pay third party pricing, not a fan of that

Title: Down in da boot, it is what ya need!
Review: Tuff little storage box.

Title: Black under my eyes! Review: I expected more from this mascara.
It went on ok, but I got little specks that come off on my face, and did not use allot, not a pretty sight!
The black color is good.
I use Merle Norman water proof mascara, and sorry but this does not come close, and I had black under my
Eyes in a short time.

Title: One cameras was defective.....I hate having to return items that are shipped defective.....What a waste of time!!!!
Review: One of the 4 cameras was defective right out of the box.

Title: Comes with pencel sharpener, pencel lead is thick. Ended up with black eyes underneath. Review: This eyeliner pencil comes with a sharpener, although its a little hard to find, but it’s in the box.
The sharpener has a thin pin that I think is to get the left over lead out after you use the sharpener.

The pencil is thick, and drys fast. Although I wear a thin eyeliner, and for me it was too thick, and did dry fast,
But I ended up with black eyes under my eyes..Not a pretty !

Title: Great daily skin cleanser, reasonably priced, reduces acne flare ups
Review: I have to start by saying I am really impressed with Mountain Falls products. First, they mimic more expensive brands at the same quality without the price. I have several of them in my daily beauty and health regimine. This cleanser is great. It works best on oily skin. I had my daughter use this exclusively over the past three weeks and her skin looks amazing. Gone is the oily sheen to her skin, acne breakouts are noticeably reduced and her skin looks glowing and healthy. I have already ordered more of these (they are currently running a promotion to get $6 off). Highly recommend this for every household, but especially for ones with teens.

Title: i ended up getting these instead which are SUPER durable, all seven colors for a great price Review: a bit pricey for a single, and i agree the ad is misleading. i ended up getting these instead which are SUPER durable, all seven colors for a great price:

[[ASIN:B00TUUOCUA Play Silks 7-Color Chiffon Cloth Set]]

the other weird/great thing i wouldn't have expected is that the chiffon DOESN'T WRINKLE like silk does--like AT ALL. it just stays flat and smooth somehow. anyway, i recommend that set more! have fun!

Title: BIG
Review: Note the word "backpack." This is *not* a "bag." If you don't have lots of equipment, this will be far too bulky for your needs. As it is, we just bought the Canon Rebel 3Ti with the kit lens, and if feels almost silly to carry this around - there is so much empty space! If you are packing a ton of gear, this is probably a good choice - it's sturdy and has lots of compartments. Otherwise, it's not just something you grab for some quick pictures of the kids at the park.

Title: Super comfy with great coverage!
Review: I found it, the perfect most comfortable bra ever!  I am a very large 338 lb. woman and this bra has super great under-the-arm and back coverage and it feels so comfy like I'm wearing nothing at all while providing great support.  I also love a padded bra so my nipples don't show!

Title: Nice fragrance but dissolves in less than 3 minutes & tray is not included
Review: There are 12 coin-sized lavender shower steamers in this package. The instructions say to put it in the provided plastic tray. There is NO tray in the package. I put this in an indirect stream of water from the shower and it dissolved in less than three minutes. The fragrance was nice but fleeting in such a short time. I am glad the color is non-staining. At the current price of $15.99, this comes to $1.33 per "steamer tablet." With this money quickly washes down the drain.

Title: Great Product
Review: I purchased this product while working remotely using our MacBook Pro. I wanted to be able to utilize dual monitors and not have to work directly on the laptop which was my main reason for purchasing this docking station. It is very simple to use, literally plug and play. The item is perfect for plugging in multiple devices without having cords running everywhere. For the price and opportunities it allows, it was a great purchase!

Title: No instructions so have no idea how to use these ...
Review: No instructions so have no idea how to use these tools.  Have to pray utube has videos for me to follow.

Title: A decent portable wireless keyboard choice Review: This is a decent wireless keyboard and a good choice for the price.

Pros:
* Spacing between keys is fairly standard (don't need to scrunch your fingers together much like some mini-keyboards)
* Connection to the computer is reliable
* Response time is good.
Cons:
* Right shift key is in a nonstandard location and too small
* Key action feel is a bit springy
* Key action travel is a bit too far which sometimes results in hitting two keys instead of one (more typing errors)
* Trackpad could be larger in area and the buttons moved down to make better use of available space (it would have made more sense for the buttons to be lined up with the bottom row of the keyboard; instead they are halfway between the 2nd and 3rd rows).

But all-in-all a solid choice for a portable wireless keyboard for casual use.

Title: This mac cover is great! Review: This cover looks great on my laptop. It makes it look new! I love the change. The keyboard cover protects my laptop from spills, which is necessary with me! The cover fits perfectly!

I buy these often.

Title: Nice camera, better for shooting outdoors than indoors
Review: It seems most point and shoot cameras do better outdoors than indoors but it has a nice zoom and takes great shots.  Very easy to use.  If it would do better indoor shots, I would have given it a better score.

Title: 😔
Review: 😔

Title: Not crazy about the fit, but they are warm and soft
Review: Pretty nice socks, but not crazy about the fit. They don't hug my foot at the top (kind of loose). They have had a tendency to roll down when I wear them all day. They did work well under boots I was wearing when I went riding. Probably because the boots were fitted and did not allow the socks to roll. They are warm and are soft feeling. Not sure I will be buying more.

Title: Broke after second wear!!
Review: So cute! My grandsons loves them. UPDATE!! Strap broke after the second wear. Soooo disappointing.

Title: Small & cute foot file; hold like a computer mouse - too pricey Review: For the current price of $15.99 this is a very expensive foot file that is overpriced by about $11. If it were priced $6 or less, this would have received 5 stars. I doubt this cost more than $1.50 to make as it is cheaply made.

In order to use this, I have to hold this in my right hand like a computer mouse by grasping the outside and placing my forefinger in the center. This works gently but effectively on the dry skin on my heels. If held correctly, this file is relatively easy to hold and easy to work with. Some files are like cheese graters and this one is gentler.

This is a cute foot file but it is way too expensive for what it is.

Title: Gloves run large for a man’s hands; are exfoliating but reduces suds
Review: There are a total of eight gloves (4 pairs) in this set. These gloves are really large and appear to be more for a man's hand. I have about an inch of empty fingertips on every finger and the gloves are loose. Nevertheless, these work and act like my other exfoliating gloves. These can be used in the shower with a bar of soap. They definitely exfoliate but the gloves themselves reduce the amount of suds created. I love a lot of suds, which is why a mesh body puff is my "go to" shower accessory. These gloves are a good buy at $11.99 as it comes to $3 per pair or $1.50 per single glove. However, I recommend this only for those with large hands. I take a large in a female glove and this is still too big.

Title: No shine
Review: Not as shinny. Way too small!

Title: They're beautifully made, easy to keep in a purse
Review: This is the second time I've ordered these.  I give them as little token gifts.  They're beautifully made, easy to keep in a purse, and reasonably priced.  I hate putting my purse on the floor or having to balance it on my knee.  While these don't fit on tables with deep edges, they do fit most tables and keep my purses out of the way and where I can keep an eye on them.  A nearby diner almost always comments on how nice they are.  So far they've held up well, but I can't say they get heavy duty, constant use.

Title: Five Stars
Review: ahhhhhhh!

Title: Tablets
Review: My babies all love their tablets

Title: This shirt is not as soft as I expected; neck hole also does not stretch much Review: I ordered this in a size medium and it fits like a medium and a half because it is slightly loose on me instead of being snug like most men's mediums are on me. I usually love men's shirts like these to wear underneath my other clothes in the winter. I wore this but the material feels a bit rough and not soft like most other shirts of these types that I tried before. Also, the neck hole does not stretch much. I prefer some stretch when putting a shirt on.

It washes well in a lingerie bag and I hang dry this since it is polyester. Overall, this is just okay and I would never order this again.

Title: Gorgeous
Review: Exactly how I expected it. It is for her kindergarten Dad & Daughter dance. Thnank you

Title: Inconsistent
Review: I have recently started working at home. My husband recommended that I use a headset for phone calls. This one has been pretty inconsistent in my trial runs that I am afraid to use it on real business calls. Some calls have had a lot of static. Some calls have been dropped. Now for non-phone call use, they're a little better. The ear cups are fairly comfortable. The cable is a nice, long length. Sound quality is acceptable.

Title: Returned
Review: Did not fit, returned

Title: Low-end plastic mirror; no magnification but very functional; too pricey Review: This mirror feels a bit cheap. It is a bit larger than I expected and can be held by the handle or hung by the hand. There is no magnification but it is very functional.

The current price of $12.99 is about $5 too much for a mirror of this quality. I do not feel this is worth more than $8.

Title: Waste of money!
Review: I wouldn't buy this kit or recommend it to anyone. Even with all three lights on, it's not bright enough at all for shooting in manual. You can maybe get some good close up headshots by moving the lights so close to their face they are sweating, but that's about it. The backdrop support is nice, however. And if you can get your hands on a steamer, it will get the wrinkles out of the muslin. You can also get some piping from lowes to roll them up for storage so they wont wrinkle or get dirty. I might try to see if I can find brighter bulbs, but so far this was a waste of money.

Title: Doesn't work
Review: I used the entire tube and I have noticed no difference.

Title: Over priced samples
Review: Not worth the effort, all sample vials of miscellaneous colognes.

Title: The sound quality is good but the plastic part that goes around the ear ...
Review: It could just be my ear, but it felt as if it were going to fall off every time I moved my head.  The sound quality is good but the plastic part that goes around the ear hurts your head after a while.

Title: It's just ok.
Review: It is just ok.

Title: Generous Cut Denim Pants
Review: These denim pants fit okay. I would say that they are a women's (plus) size not a misses sizes. They are a little larger than a regular misses size 16. Plus sizes are usually more generously cut. I am currently wearing misses sizes, but have worn plus sizes in the past. The pants are pretty comfortable. The stud design near the bottom of the leg is cute. I was afraid it might be too ornate, but it looks good. I really don't like the frayed hem. I don't mind mild fraying, but this is over the top. I felt like a scarecrow in these pants. I realize that's a personal preference and may not be what others think. It's possible it's an age thing on my end. The pants are made well other than that. Overall, I think these are just okay.

Title: Fwiw, this has no way to be non- mirrored for forward camera usage. Permanent mirrored cam for backup use only
Review: A very high quality design as well as camera BUT make sure you only buy as a REVERSE ,MIRROR IMAGE backup cam as this has none of the wires that permit flipping picture for forward camera viewing. I use these as spotter cams & was disappointed that I didn't see that in description very clearly so it is useless for my application on a rock crawler Jeep. For what it is it - non alterable backward only automotive camera,  seems a great deal, tho . 3 stars for not prominently displaying the "locked to a mirror image only " nature of this .

Title: Orange
Review: Pretty sure this is what Trump uses on his face. Orange and very fake looking.

Title: Battery Not Included
Review: I usually use a Flawless hair trimmer, but I saw this and thought it would be a nice one to keep in my travel bag. The design and colors are fun. The package says that it uses a USB charger/cable, but that's wrong. It uses a battery which is not included. It was actually a bit challenging to get it open to insert the battery. I had to have my husband help me and it was difficult for him too. The Flawless one is pretty simple to open, this one was not. It does a decent job of trimming. If you need to trim the eyebrows, it does have the option to do so. I primarily use it for trimming facial hair so I don't need the eyebrow piece. So far, it's working fine and I will keep using it.

Title: Great straightener for all hair types!
Review: This is a great flat iron. I have been using irons for many years now as I love to keep my naturally wavy hair as a straightening mechanism. This Hot Tools iron is really nice. It feels well in my hand, is relatively light weight and is easy to maneuver all around my hair. And my hair looks so smooth and shiny! The iron heats up quickly and evenly and makes my hair styling go relatively fast. I also love the white and gold design, looks great on my bathroom counter. Highly recommend!

Title: Complete and utter junk; went in the garbage
Review: I had high hopes for this razor. It comes with a base tray, the main razor body with the nose trimmer installed, an eyebrow trimmer cap, and a precision trimmer cap along with a user guide. It takes one AA battery (NOT INCLUDED). The battery cap does not want to stay on. It took me about 10 minutes just to seat the cap and after I had, it kept wanting to fall off. The precision trimmer head also wanted to keep falling off. I was barely able to try this and it did not perform well at all. The precision trimmer requires more than razor stubble to use. This is complete junk; I threw it out.

Title: I love how this shampoo is not tested on animals; however, I would like more fragrance and lather Review: I have fine, long, wavy and sometimes curly hair that falls to my mid back. This shampoo is lightly fragrant and is not tested on animals. It did not lather up as copiously as some other shampoos I have tried.

After using this, my hair dried soft and bouncy but it did not feel any more hydrated than the non-hydrating shampoos I’ve used previously. Since my hair is fine, I actually prefer less hydration so this is not an issue for me. Its limited fragrance and lather make this a shampoo that is just okay to me but one I personally would not buy simply because I prefer a lot of scent and suds. However, I do love how this is not tested on animals

Title: Good But Not Great
Review: Fits the 8" Amazon tablet well and securely. Leaves plenty of access to buttons and ports and even gives good access to the speakers. I had no real plans to use the different stand capabilities of the case and I'm not truly that impressed with them. Maybe it takes some breaking in. All I really wanted was to protect the screen where I store my tablet in a pocket on the grab bar of my bed and it does that job well. The automatic on/off function is a bit quirky. I've picked up the tablet with the cover closed only to see through the crack that it was already awake. 4 stars for fit and protection. 3 stars for the standing features not being that great and occasional it coming on before the cover is actually opened.

Title: RETURNED
Review: POOR QUALITY FOR PRICE

Title: My husband hates my shopping habits!!!
Review: Honest & True: like everyone else I check reviews and was on the up and down about this product. Please save your self time and money. Once I open it I enjoyed the look but the sound quality was horrible and the wires were short. This is not suitable for use as a surround sound system and is poor quality. The big guy said that’s what I get for rushing to buy and being cheap! I agree!

Title: Small and Lightweight
Review: I wanted a small crossbody carrier for my cell phone when I do not have pockets that will hold it.  This should function well and is attractive as well as efficient.

Title: Great cover and protection
Review: Fits my MacBook Air perfectly! Has a soft touch. Great product.

Title: Poor Quality
Review: It was sloppy. Didn't go on properly and dried out quickly became crumbly.

Title: Looks just like the ones we replaced.
Review: The laces look just like the ones we replaced. They are sturdy and a good length.

Title: Nice material but if is a bit large around the bottom
Review: Material is nice and stretchy but it's a bit short and rather large around the waist. Good for at home wear but wouldn't wear it outside as it looks awkward on me. Very comfortable. If you're trying to hide a belly might be perfect if your not on the taller side.

Title: Too small
Review: Runs small and I have ordered. Ew Balance before so the size is not the same

Title: Decent product, smells a bit odd
Review: Decent deep conditioner. The fragrance was a bit chemically smelling. I can say that it didn't cause any issues with my salon-dyed color -- always a good thing since we spend $$$ to get that awesome hue!

Title: Shower safe, rechargeable, No Trimer. Review: Nice Braun Razor for the price.

First I want to say, this does Not have a trimer, its just a straight electric rechargeable shaver.
This can be used in the shower 100% water safe.

My grown son has a average beard he usually shaves everyday. He likes a clean shave.
He has not used this in the shower, although its water proof, and can be use in the shower safely.
What he finds is, he has to use this Slow to get the close shave he likes. Using it fast he is not happy with the results.
This Braun razor does not pull his beard out while shaving, which his other More expensive razor does.

This is a nice middle of the road razor.
Taking off 1 1/2 stars for not having a trimer on this.

Title: I like the watch in general and its tracking
Review: I like the watch in general and its tracking.  the watch band is not great.  it quickly stretches and then falls off easily.  I would recomend paying a little more and getting one with a normal watch band

Title: Eh. Could be worse
Review: Its cheap but it works. I'd buy again

Title: Don’t buy
Review: Super thin and very see through and much different shade of blue than in photos.

Title: Small print not pressed properly
Review: Sadly the graphic is not fully placed to the shirts so I have to explain the full quote. Not joking. Regret not spending the toonies for real licensed.

Title: shampoo and conditioner bars
Review: Hmmm.  I really LOVE the idea.  However, as an actual working (likable) shampoo and conditioner (separate bars) - I really didn't like them.  They don't really froth enough - which while might be 'healthier' for some reason, it doesn't leave you feeling like your hair is clean... I didn't really care for the scents either. Now, if I had super short hair or a balding head (dude) - these might work.  I have shoulder length hair and find these are not for me.  I may try a different brand.  I really do love the idea of no more shampoo and conditioner bottles in land fills!

Title: That the color was right.
Review: It is very closes to my coloer. So yes get one.

Title: Color looks like baby poop!
Review: This product is in a small pump which makes it very difficult to apply! The color that I received looks like baby poop!!

Title: Gentle and thorough facial cleanser!
Review: This is a super gentle, lightly fragranced, cleanser that I absolutely love. I tend to use keratin treatments quite often in my hair which forces me to use sulfate free shampoos. I love that this facial cleanser is also sulfate free which allows me to use it in the shower as well as at my sink without fear of getting something into my hair which will ruin my treatment. On top of it, this is a very reasonably priced product as well, which thoroughly cleans and removes my makeup. I highly recommend.

Title: Great facial cleanser for multiple uses a day!
Review: I live in Florida and I am very active. I wash my face multiple times a day to remove sweat and dirt (I love to play pickleball and tennis).  This is truly a gentle cleanser, my skin feels great after using and not dry at all. It lathers up nicely and my skin actually feels softer and moisturized after using. Highly recommend for all skin types (I have mixed oily and dry skin).

Title: A good staple Review: This is a nice lightweight cardigan to add to your wardrobe . Comes in several colors. Does not wrinkle a bunch when wearing.

The cardigan was very wrinkly when taken out of the package. I put it in the refresh cycle of my dryer, then ironed it. I thought it would end up very wrinkly after ear, but it did not.

Lightweight. Good when temperatures start to rise. A great cut. Very comfortable. I found it flattering.

True to size. I am 5’4” and weigh 175 lbs. I ordered an Xl and it fit well.

I would definitely order other colors.

Title: Okay
Review: I needed something to tie me over for a day until I got my hair in soft locs. I got many compliments on it. The hair will be nice for these occasional type of days. The quality isn’t good to last for daily use though, in my opinion.

Title: Compact and well made
Review: Great little mouse. I travel often so this has been tossed into my backpack, jostled around, and still works like a charm every time.

Title: I do not care for the fragrance but after the lotion sinks in, my hands felt silky Review: Personally I do not like this cucumber fragrance which smells like old watermelon to me. I applied a liberal amount on my hands and at first it felt tacky. However, after I rubbed it in and waited awhile, my hands were really silky. From this perspective I loved the results. Nevertheless, I am super fragrance oriented and a lotion or soap has to arouse my senses in a pleasant way and this one does not but it does work.

My favorite hand lotion is [[ASIN:B000NOYB3A Camille Beckman Glycerine Hand Therapy in the Camille scent]].

Title: Great cable at great price
Review: Great little 3 ft cable. Needed something long enough to reach from adapter to my bed, and not so long as to get tangled in it. It is nylon braided and charges great. I have not used the transfer function yet.

Title: HIGHLY DISAPPOINTED
Review: FIT VERY SMALL, DEFINITELY GOT RIPPED OFF, TO PRICY, NOT A VERY GOOD DESCRIPTION,  DOES NOT FIT PLUS SIZED HIPS 😑

Title: Long-Boobed "Wonderless" Fit Review: This will look great if you are humongously "long-bodied" from the shoulders to the waist.
Requires " knotting" up the neckline to secure as it appears to be designed for a very Tall "AMAZON" woman with "mega-boobs"...which I am not....am just a standard height/weight.

Title: Great for your lips.
Review: Enjoying the my new lip balm. Tastes great and makes my lips super soft. I will be getting more of these.

Title: Beautiful Fabric, Wide Brim, Shallow Crown Review: This TOMMY HILFIGER MEN’S CHAMBRAY MINI FLAG BASEBALL DAD CAP is constructed of beautiful chambray fabric (white weft, colored warp) that looks like mottled, faded blue denim. It’s a practical color that won’t easily show dirt. The cap’s bill is wide and long, to properly shade the eyes.

Unfortunately, the crown is shallow, so that the cap perches on the top of the head. (I think this is probably a “medium profile” cap, though it could be a “low profile” cap.) I find the shallow crown style to be both uncomfortable and unflattering. No amount of adjustment of the strap in back can fix this.

The back strap adjusts with a flat metal clasp. The strap end fits into a buttonhole that holds the end down and out of sight.

Title: Dont know why seller lists 5 year warranty when W/D says no.
Review: The drive is ok but the seller does not tell you when you go to the W/D site to add it for warranty it says its an OEM item without warranty. The seller lists it with 5-year limited warranty. What is up with this?

Title: Disappointed!
Review: The hair clips that actually work are wonderful for thin hair. On too many of the clips the three guiding prongs Push up through the upper portion.

Title: Nice design but parts quality/build issue Review: I own two Perixx PERIMICE-710 mice which have been solid performers for 3 years running; I ordered this one for its ergonomic design and extra buttons. But out-of-the-box the main left button was "soft" and had to be pressed in a particular location for it to click. The right button was fine. This points to a parts quality or build/test issue. I've returned it and will look for an alternative wireless ergonomic mouse instead.

Title: Many compliments
Review: I purchased a 2x womens but it runs on the smaller side.  I still wear it by stretching it out by hand,  Many compliments and makes people smile when they read it

Title: Not waterproof or coffee proof
Review: This stuff comes off real easy, As soon as I put it on I started to drink my coffee and realized the color was on my cup, it made me sad

Title: Holes already!
Review: My son has only worn them for 1 month and holes are already starting.

Title: Very Satisfied buy
Review: The pin I received looked like it did in the photo.  It is a substantial piece, well made, and suits my purpose.

Title: Canon PIXMA MG2920
Review: If you want to use a printer that MUST be hooked up with a USB, this will work.  However, the wifi hookup of this printer would NOT work.  SUPER disappointed. My husband and I worked for hours to "pick up" this printer after downloading the drivers, etc... the printer NEVER showed up on any of our devices, 4 different devices in total were tried.  Tried the "customer help line".... number rang and rang with NO ANSWER!!  OMG. Tried numerous times to get help online... wow... NOTHING useful or solution based anyway. After hours of frustration, I called no joy and we gave up.  We are keeping it for the copy/scan option but only until we pony up for yet ANOTHER wireless printer.  Then, it's a boat anchor.  I always update my reviews if something useful arises.

Title: Lightly fragrant bath bombs with surprise jewelry inside; decent performance but staining Review: [[VIDEOID:9faeeb655f0c302a58df3fb857db320a]] At the current price of $23.99, these bombs come to $4 each which is slightly expensive. Each bomb has a surprise stretchy bracelet inside that is encased in a plastic bubble.

I tried the rose bath bomb in my foot bath. The fragrance is nice but subtle. The suds lasted only eight minutes but the fragrance lasted the entire bath. The bomb dissolved to release the surprise in about five minutes. The color of the water was a cranberry red and the color stained my feet and towels but not my foot bath.

In summary, the performance of these bombs is decent and the suds are not as long lasting as I would like. The colored water stained--at least on the bomb I tried. The fragrance, however, is subtle but very nice. A young girl will love the surprise bracelets and acceptable performance of these bath bombs. However, at $4 each one--there are six of them, this is expensive. The six bombs are lavender, rose, lemongrass, jasmine, chamomile, and rosemary.

Title: It’s ok
Review: It’s ok

Title: Not what is described
Review: Product provides protection against scratches but it DOES show fingerprints!  I do not think the product justifies the high price !  Also, following directions was difficult.  The print was very small and hard to read since it was in several languages. I question whether this is really glass and not plastic.

Title: Great deal!
Review: Fantastic deal on stickers! Great assortment!

Title: Great option for a contact wearer
Review: I love Lash Blast and this Clean version is really good. As a contact wearer I usually struggle with makeup debris ending up in my eye and causing irritation. After a couple weeks of use I've had no irritation. It doesn't smudge as much as the other regular non-waterproof version. It's very easy to remove with my normal face wash and cleaner.

Title: Excellent Astringent
Review: Have been using this astringent for several years.  Excellent for oily skin...without drying.  Just wish I'd  found it MANY years/decades ago!

Title: Expensive facial toner that left my face slightly less acne-prone Review: I always shower first before using any products so that means my face was already clean. I then applied this religiously both day and night for one week before my moisturizing regimen. As instructed, I saturated one pad and wiped down my face being sure to avoid my eyes. Each pad was as clean as when I started. On a positive note, I did not have any allergic reaction to the salicyclic acid as I do with Proactiv's other products that contain Benzoyl peroxide. The only other benefit I noticed is that my face is a little less prone to acne. Other than this, this toner is not impressive enough for me to buy it at the outrageous price of $44.95.

Ingredients in order are:
- water
- butylene glycol
- hamamelis virginiana (witch hazel) water
- glycolic acid
- salicyclic acid
- sodium hydroxide
- portulaca oleracea extract
- polysorbate 20
- ethylhexylglycerin
- disodium EDTA
- sodium benzoate
- phenoxyethanol

Title: Not great
Review: It doesn't reach as far as it says it should

Title: Three Stars
Review: Nice

Title: It’s nice
Review: I really like this lipstick. It is not overpowering, more of a nice subtle coloring for your lips. I have a light skin tone - freckle nose reddish hair type of skin color and the berry smoothie works well for me.

Title: Too small but pretty
Review: I wear large and ordered large , sent it back cause it wouldn’t go over thighs , the large fits like a 6 , wish it did fit because it’s very cute

Title: It's probably just me
Review: Rating this printer as a 4 star for the following reason: First, print quality and speed are terrific. Scanning is done with ease and perfectly passes the data to my computer (where I e-mailed the scan to a friend). For the money, this printer is a great deal. It's not just a printer, but so much more, and for less than $100, it couldn't be much better of a deal. Now the bad part: I am not technically, computer inclined. I spent over an hour trying to get this to work wirelessly. My goal was to take the printer and stick it in a closet and out of view so it wouldn't be cluttering up my office space and would be functional without being in sight. I used the CD rom which came with the printer and read the directions from start to finish several times. Still couldn't get it to work. Anyway, my son will be home at the end of July for two weeks and I am going to see if he is able to get this to print wirelessly for me. I will update the rating on this and add additional comments if I can get it to work the way it was intended;. Like I said in my title, it may be just me...

Title: Size 7 wide and Huge.Love the pale pink Review: These are cute , and I likes the color pale pink..
I wear in a sandal a 6 to a size 7. Since some people said they run small I got a 7.
Omgosh, they where Huge..and for wide fat feet!!
I admit I have thin feet, but my husband can wear the shoe box (he is Slim). If the shoes was longer he could probably fit into the shoe!!!
That said, I got a free return label and send these cute beach sandals back.
I was afraid to order a 6, and then it not be the right size again..Darn..

Title: Does not take off my makeup
Review: Does not not only not take off my makeup once opened package does not want to seal. In this case you get what you pay for.

Title: Perfect compact travel companion. A must have!
Review: This is a great travel hair dryer. Compact, folds easily and stores in my suitcase with little room for space. I tend to always carry a travel hair dryer with me even if I plan to stay at a hotel which supplies them in rooms. Particularly in Europe, I never know what I will be getting, but with this Revlon I know it is reliable, has the strength to easily dry my shoulder length hair quickly and will provide me with consistent performance whereever I travel. This is a must have for anyone who likes to travel!

Title: THE WORST PURCHASE I HAVE MADE ON AMAZON!! Review: I really don't like to leave a negative review but I rely heavily on reviews before making a purchase but I feel very strongly about this purchase so here it goes. DON'T BUY THESE SPONGES!! We purchased these sponges for $25, which is a lot of money for us, hoping to have a sponge for each of us. You are paying $25 for basically 1 sponge. The 2 medium sponges are pretty small and hard to hold and also wash with. The 2 small sponges are SO small that I couldn't even use it for our youngest daughter. I tried to use it to wash my face but it is too small as it is the size of a golf ball!

Beyond the size, they fell apart in less than 2 weeks time and we took great care of them. This is a waste of money and I was so disappointed! This was not a small purchase for us but would have been worth it if they worked but for just one decent size sponge that fell apart, instead of being able to use these to clean us, we were taken to the cleaners!

Title: Lightly fragrant; produces rainbow-colored suds; color adheres; no face on bomb; $$$ Review: There is one super large individually wrapped bath bomb in this package. Based on the Amazon picture, I expected to have a face on the bomb or the bomb plastic and that is not the case. It is just an XL white cloud bath bomb.

It has a nice light fragrance when dry and in the bath. The ingredients are sodium bicarbonate, citric acid, aqua, fragrance, PVP, and benzyl benzoate.

It performs well, produces a lovely rainbow of suds, and dissolves in about 10-15 minutes. Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I use them in a foot bath. When I was done, some color did adhere to my foot bath and my drying towel. I suspect if I used this in a bathtub I would not have had the same problem due to the water disbursement.

The current cost of $8.49 ($9.99 minus 15%) for one bomb is too expensive for this in my opinion especially when there is no face on the bomb and not even on the plastic.

Title: So-So sound bar
Review: This will give you better sound than the typical flat screen TV, but don't expect much in the way of volume or dynamic range.  The remote provide is infrared which is awkward unless the bar will be at eye level. I got a good deal on a sale price so I'm going to complain too much.

Title: galaxy tab a kid cover
Review: These are 3 pieces and appear to be super tough.  Time will tell and I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  I purchased 2 - the red/black and navy/green - for my two grandsons.  Their mom was very impressed.  Was a bit of trick to get them on - but once on, they seem like they will definitely protect the expensive tablets.  They do have kickstands in the back.

Title: Dries out my hair
Review: I really wanted to love this shampoo and conditioner.  I don't  mind having a drier scalp because it's usually oily.  This shampoo and condition made my hair strands feel like straw.  I don't recommend this product at all.

Title: This is a nice director board. sturdy
Review: This is a lot more sturdier than I thought it would be.  It's cute and colorful.  It's great for home made films or photography.  It comes with an erasable marker.

Title: good quality but not a good fit
Review: Good price and quality. It comes with two silicone inserts - a thinner one for standard Macbooks and a thicker one for the Macbook AIRs. I have an AIR - it doesn't fit securely in the thinner insert and would require a lot of force to squeeze it into the thicker one. I don't want to damage the computer or have problems getting it out of the stand when I need to remove it so I'll probably rig up some sort of shim to make the thinner insert hold my AIR more securely.

Review: Fair at best. Remote is sketchy. As far working with Alexa...Ha!!

Title: Would buy again
Review: Very nice. Great durability.  Fabrics has a good heaviness/thickness to it. Lots of pockets.

Title: Will need to order again
Review: Second order for these.  Use them a lot around the holidays.

Title: Silicone side is best as spot applicator; brush end is best; no air holes for drying Review: This is a dual-end brush with cover. The tiny silicone end is practically useless for washing but it is great as a spot applicator for acne cream and the like. It just has to be scrubbed off afterward. The brush end is nice for washing by sudsing up that end. Unfortunately, it is very difficult to remove the cover from this unit. Also, there are no air holes in the cover, so the end that is being covered must be fully dried before covering it.

The current price of $8.48 is a bit pricey for this. I like this but do not love it.

Title: Worst cord ever
Review: Worst cord ever. The first one I bought wouldn’t plug in correctly and I could only hear sound on one side. They replaced it and here we are, only 2 months later and it’s already not working. Don’t even waste your $10.

Title: Horrible quality & more like lip liner brushes Review: To me these are not mascara brushes. The tips are so thin it is a disgrace and the wands are weak. These would work as lip liner brushes. I do not like them. There is barely any cotton at the tip to soak up anything.

The current price of $6.99 comes to $0.07 cents per wand since there are 100 wands in this pack.

Title: Basic Sweatpants
Review: These are pretty much your basic sweatpants. The material is thin and light weight. They are not particularly soft, though they aren't rough either. The fit is pretty good. My daughter is 5'7" and weighs about 150 pounds. She wears mediums in leggings and sweatpants and these mediums fit her as expected. There are no pockets which is a disappointment. They seem to be made well with secure seams and stitches. They wash well. Overall, these are really just okay. They do the job, but they're not anything special.

Title: Collector
Review: Happy collector

Title: Great combination of moisturizer plus SPF protection!
Review: I love ROC products! And, this moisturizer with the added benefit of SPF 30 protection is amazing! Goes on lightly and smoothly and is absorbed quickly. No greasy after feel (typical of SPF products), this can be used under makeup easily. Highly recommend!

Title: Great Workout Pant! Review: Great pants! Love the feel of the material, which seems durable but also lightweight. I also like the style, especially since they have pockets. The pants do run big, but roomy is what I was looking for, so I am very pleased.

I recommend these to anyone looking for a lightweight, stylish jogger pant.

Title: Not Impressed Review: The container feels backwards. The top is the wide, flat end. The bottom is the point. That just feels backwards. It is especially weird when holding it. It just doesn’t feel right.
The crayon part is really thin. It has a consistency like lip liner and is just barely thicker than a lip liner. It makes lining the lips simple, but the filling is a bit more difficult. You can use the tapered side of the crayon to fill the lips.
The formula was thick, but didn’t offer much coverage. It was also pretty dry and left my lips feeling chapped and uncomfortable. It wasn’t smooth or creamy. It felt like an almost matte lipstick.
Overall, it just didn’t work for me. I did like the color. But it wasn’t long lasting enough or pigmented enough.

Title: good
Review: great product.  doesn't get to funky.  I dig it.  can sleep in it for a day or 2 no problem

Title: Totally disappointed....
Review: Warm and cozy and very comfortable......However within the first 2 two month both pockets came apart from the robe itself. I am completely disappointed because I read the reviews and they were almost to good to be true. I would definitely rethink buying this. I wish that more things were made with pride. I shall make my own robes for myself and my fiance. Why pay the price for something that sounds so wonderful and it falls apart.

Title: Not as comfortable as it feels! Review: I’m not big busted but as I get older bra’s are starting feeling too tight, uncomfortable.
This bra at first felt comfortable , but then it started to feel tight and I felt restricted also, beside looking
Like one big boob! No form to this bra

The elastic at the bottom was not tight enough, and I felt I was falling out of the bottom.
I wear a 34C or a 36B No under wires, to be more comfortable and this is large and too big and
Uncomfortable.
I returned this.

Title: oil painting of Paris Passport cover
Review: It is well made. I was looking for a passport cover that did not look like it held a passport. And this is a good one. In my purse it looks like a little photo album. The stitching around the edges is really nicely done. The passport fits nicely inside. The outside is easy to wipe off. The only thing I would change is the I would like the Eiffel Tower to be on the front. But I would recommend this product.

Title: Stopped telling time
Review: Expensive looking. Was worn every other day. Face scuffs easy. Stopped reading time altogether 6 months after I bought.

Title: A good enough travel set for the price but not great Review: For the current price of $3.99, this is a good enough travel brush/mirror set for the price but it is not great. This set includes a combined brush/mirror, three spiral hair ties, and a large comb.

The spiral hair ties are okay and work to put my hair up into a little pony tail. The comb is big and not something I would travel with but it is a decent detangler for the shower. However, the main item is the brush/mirror combo. The mirror actually acts like the handle of the brush. First of all, using the mirror as the handle is awkward. Second, the brush is really tiny and would not be good for someone with a lot of hair. It passed through my short to medium-length fine curly hair just fine but I had to comb in very tiny strips. Third, it is not easy to collapse the brush into itself. I actually had to collapse it with my fingers. I thought just closing the mirror over the brush would work but it did not. Also, once closed, it wobbles on the counter.

Title: Runny, sticky, disgusting lotion – I need a shower after using this
Review: This lotion is absolutely yucky to me. I tried this on my skin and it is runny, sticky, and feels like I spilled lemonade or another sticky substance all over my body. I could not wait to wash this off. This is so bad, it went right in the garbage. I can't believe they are charging $32.40 for this stuff. It's gross.

Title: Great for swear wicking & UV protection
Review: I use Buffs in the summer to wick swear away from my head, keep ticks off of my hair, and provide UV protection for my head, neck, face, etc while hiking and running. They can also go under a hat to keep it clean. I love these things, I have several brands but BUFF is UPF50 which is hard to beat!

Title: 'Couldnt get good visual acuity {on the one I got}.
Review: Ive noticed thru the years when buying Binos and more recently, {these} Monoculars, that at times I get one that is sub-standard in its quality, where I cannot get good visual acuity adjustment. Sometimes I return for an exchange(of same item), then the replacement sent to me will be fine. So that said, I am not sure if the issue today is 'just these', or if its the {entire} model/brand. These are being returned but I decided not to roll the dice and get a replacement of this brand. They are lightweight and a feel good in the hands tho.

Title: Use it a lot during Christmas
Review: This is my second purchase of this product

Title: I'm just not happy about being told I'm purchasing a NEW phone when ... Review: I am not certain how well it works yet but it was sold as NEW and I found out someone out there is still paying for the phone, that tells me it is NOT new. I purchased this and just got it activated to send to a little gal who was dating my son last summer and she had to move a long way away from us. I am hoping it works well so she has a way to stay in touch with us. I will update when she tries it out for awhile. I'm just not happy about being told I'm purchasing a NEW phone when it's a PREVIOUSLY OWNED phone. That's FALSE ADVERTISING!!! IF I HAD KNOWN, I WOULD NOT HAVE PURCHASED!

Title: should be so much better
Review: There is a constant commercial on the home screen to try and get you to buy a new book.  Very annoying.  The charging usb was absurdly short with no adapter.  Battery life for me is maybe a day, I like to use headphones with audible books and listen to when I am doing housework or yard work.  It is only as good as your wifi.  so if your wifi is spotty, so will your download.  For the money I paid and the promises made, not worth it.

Title: breathe deep bath salts
Review: Smells really great, but it's a tiny bottle.  You MIGHT be able to stretch 2 tubs out of it.  Eh on that part.

Title: Meh
Review: I was super excited about it because I kept losing the remote. I do like that it stands out more. The silicone tends to not stay in place and lower itself, therefore covering buttons which is pretty annoying. I do like the string attached though. I hang it on my headboard.

Title: I bought it for the gimmick and I was still disappointed Review: Don't get me wrong, it's a mouse. It functions like a mouse should and nothing else.

Pros:
-The tank-track scroll wheel is a neat gimmick to show your friends once. Whole reason I bought it basically.
-projected logo is cool, albeit blurry
-Feels ok in the hand, and the clicking action is satisfying (should expect as much from cherry)

Cons:
-Horrible, and I mean Horrible side button placement. They are way too far back, feel cheap and squishy, and hitting the back button requires you to be a hand gymnast. Either they tested this with child hands or didn't test it at all.
-Useless RGB. Seriously, it's nearly invisible, why even include it? I had it for a week before I realized it had RGB lighting
-sensitivity controls are a goldilocks game. Low is incredibly low, high makes your mouse a crackhead, and medium is manageable.
-super cheap packaging.

If you want to try a neat gimmick mouse, give it a shot. Don't expect it to be a great mouse though

Title: Does not work without modifing wiring harness
Review: Did not work as it is advertised. Was told it would fit my vehicle, did not recommend any additional items and as item was received did not work with my truck

Title: Poor sound
Review: Very disappointed in the speakers. The reviews where good so I was surprise how lousy the sound was. Not sure why anyone would rate them better then one star..

Title: Three Stars
Review: a bit difficult to insert SD cards, esp. for MicroSD.

Title: Ok
Review: Ok

Title: Super dark long-lasting lipstick that glides on smoothly; smells like a Crayola crayon Review: This review is for the lipstick color labeled "watch me" which is a very deep burgundy color that is almost black.

This lipstick glides smoothly on my lips and stays put, even after eating. I do not wear lipstick for 24 hours, so I cannot attest to it's wearability for that length of time; however, I could still see the color after eight hours. Although, this is a matte finish, it still looks great. In the future, I will be applying another lipstick over this because the color is a bit deep for my fair complexion. 

What I find amazing about this lipstick is that when I blot my lips, very little of the color can be seen on the tissue. What I don't like is the Crayola crayon smell and taste of the lipstick and the fact that it is a bit too dark for me. Nevertheless, this is a great long lasting lipstick as long as one wants a muted matte finish and the color complements their complexion.

Title: So cute!
Review: Really soft fabric, looks adorable on my son!

Title: Low-end brush set that does the job; it is a selection for every hair length Review: There are five brushes in this brush set that are STUFFED into a plastic zippered bag. Four of the brushes are radial brushes and one is a paddle / detangle type brush.

The paddle brush is just okay. The bristles are short but the brush is functional.

The radial brushes are good for blow drying my hair. Since there are several circumferences, there is a brush for almost every hair length. These are lightweight and the ribbed grip on the handle is excellent. I do not like that there is this metal blank name tag on the handle that breaks up the grip. I do not understand the purpose of that. The bristles are so, so on these brushes and made of hard nylon. They work and go through my hair easily but they will not keep their shape long.

This is a basic low-end functional set. At the current price of $25.99, it comes to $5.20 per brush.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Smaller than I thought.

Title: Cute but sizing is way off.  Way too small
Review: I purchased one of these swimsuits and loved it.  It fit great so i ordered another one different colors (this one).  It is way too small.  It doesn't fit anything like the other one and I ordered the same size.  Size consistency is way off.  It wasn't even close.  I hope I can return it.  I purchased a second one like this in Large.  The top fit fine 36 C+ but the bottom was way too small, more like an XS.

Title: Too Tight in the Arms
Review: Be sure to check the size chart before ordering! I am a size 16 and can usually wear XL shirts. This XL is equal to a 14. Their 1XL is closer to a 16. The shirt does kind of fit, but it doesn't look good on me at all. The biggest problem with the fit was the arm cuffs. They are very tight on me. I am afraid that if I were to stretch too much while wearing it, they might rip. The rest of the shirt fits okay, but this style just doesn't work on my curvy body type. The material is also very sheer. You will want to wear a camisole underneath it. I did like the length of it. The fabric print is cute.

Title: I love the pink color of this brush but I like URTHEONE brushes better; quick assembly required Review: I already own these [[ASIN:B08BNHZ833URTHEONE detangling brushes]] and love them. Therefore, I wanted a pink one like this for my pink bathroom so I ordered this.

There is one pink detangling brush with one rod that needs to be installed on top. I prefer a wider brush, so I installed it on the lower rung. 

I use my other brushes every other day to detangle my hair in the shower and love them but this pink one is not as great. First of all the handle is cheap and does not have a silicone grip. This means the grip is not as good. Second, the rod that gets installed only has two nubs on it that connect with the tines of the brush instead of several like the other brushes. This means it does not stay put as easily. However, it still works on detangling my short to medium curly hair in the shower and if some hair gets caught, it easily rinses out. In addition, this can be used as a regular brush too. 

The current price of $5.99 is reasonable for one brush but I recommend the other brand over this one.

Title: Does not work
Review: Did not work for any mode.

Title: The fringe drags on the ground
Review: And also I cannot zip them all the way up. If you are super skinny you'd be ok.

Title: Like thin snowpants
Review: Unfortunately my grandson strongly dislikes the crinkly material these are made with. He likes comfortable and soft clothing and this doesn't meet his requirements.  He would prefer to get his clothing wet than wear these. They seem well made, look really nice and if your child doesn't mind the "noisy" material, these would be great pants for spring or warmer winters. The waist is a little larger than other starter size medium shorts he has. There is also a thin mesh lining in the top half of the pants. We have a lot of starter clothing items and this is the first that he didn't like.

Title: Don't do it
Review: Nothing like the one's I bought 15 years ago when they were made here. Just more junk from China, They are like 2 sizes to small

Title: This bronzer is hardly noticeable on my fair skin
Review: I thought this could be used as a contour powder or bronzer over my existing makeup. However, it is hardly noticeable on my fair skin and I used it all over my face. I expected a more enhanced look from this powder.

Title: beaded fitbit3 bracelet
Review: I like this bracelet... it was easy to install -  the bracelet beads are stung on elastic thread... so eventually that may be an issue... it's a little snug on my average size wrist.  But will do for a fancier occasion.  On the other hand - you can just remove your fitbit for the evening.  :)  I like the colors.  I chose the black and sort of tan.  They are well represented in the photos provided.  It's a nice match to the fitbit3.  All in all I like it... except that its a tad snug.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: it died Review: Never buying ASUS again

graphics car went, battery went, fans went, the power adapter shorted

what a waste of $1200

Title: Definitely not for me!
Review: Unlike others, I found this awful. First, I used it sparingly on my legs after showering twice (two days in a row). I will say, the moisturizing was great, went on smooth and had a very light fragrance and there was nothing visible to be seen upon the initial application . I didn't notice until the following morning (after the two applications) that the coloring was dramatic and the top of my feet (where I hadn't put any on) were a stark white when compared to a dark brown legs (with streaks). I also saw in between my fingers, some brown coloring. I ended up using a wash cloth to try to clean up my legs and my fingers and ended up making the streaks even worse. I am not sure who can use this or why. I would prefer to spend $10 and get a spray tan as this is way too difficult to see what the impact will be until a day or two after the application and at that time, it will be too late. Might be good for someone else, but not me.

Title: Marware Capacitive Stylus for Kindle Fire
Review: I am giving it a 2 because it does work better than the other one I bought, the cheap one scratched my plastic holder of my kindle, But it didn't last but 2 months, which I think is not very long for $15.00. The top screws off, I wish you could buy replaceable tops ( maybe you ought to think of that Marware!)

Title: A good price too
Review: I have a best friend who is a granny/nanny for her daughter's family who's husband is currently serving in our military.  They are a family of five and I just wanted to help with them with some shelf stable pantry and other items. These arrived quickly and in good condition.  I really appreciate that Amazon helps me to help them!

Title: Not the best
Review: These were my first pair of Bluetooth headphones and honestly I wasn't impressed. They didn't work very well and the sound was muffled. Wouldn't spend your money on these.

Title: Great, simple, strong
Review: Can easily hold 2 pairs of headphones and looks great!

Title: Brush set that does the job; a selection for every hair length; handles are great; got 1 wrong brush Review: There are four radial brushes in this brush set that are STUFFED into the box. They are extra small (1"), small (1-1/4"), and two (2) large (2-1/8"). I have no idea why they included two large ones as it would have been nice to have a medium instead. In fact, the box says I was supposed to get one that was 1-5/8" in size but that was not included.

The radial brushes are good for blow drying my hair. Since there are several circumferences, there is a brush for almost every hair length. The bristles are so, so on these brushes and made of hard nylon. They work and go through my hair easily but I have to be careful not to scratch my scalp.

This brush set is functional and works as designed. I really love the handles and the gray/black color. I do wish they included one medium brush instead of two large ones as the box indicated. At the current price of $44.99, these are a bit pricey as they come to $11.25 each.

Title: A huge problem with Amazon Review: A lot of times you see a lot of positive reviews for a product, but then you get the item and it isn't great or good. It is mediocre or sucks. This product is like this. People are still paid to review products but they areore hidden about it. There are sites that pay people to review items, stores and restaurants. These people don't even love in the are they are reviewing.
My point is, this thing blows air yes but not strongly. Those expensive cans of air blowore air than this does. You can buy a cheap fan and get the same amount of air blowing around.

Review: It’s seems to be a good strong cable and it seems like it will hold up well. Time will tell!

Review: This is not the real face cream, after using it for 6 weeks I saw 0 results so I went to the store and bought a new one and what a difference in texture, smell, and results..... buyer beware!!!!!!!!!!!!
