Title: Nice moisturizing cream for a more youthful you!
Review: Really nice facial and neck moisturizer. It goes on thick and luxurious and absorbs into the skin quickly and easily. I have crepey skin, particularly on my neck area, and I am always looking for something which will help. This cream has definitely made a difference as I can see a definite smoothing and tighter neck after using for just a few weeks. The only complaint I have is the price as I think this is expensive, but a little goes a long way (I can use a medium sized pea shaped dab to do most of my face and neck).  I recommend this for men and woman and all skin types.

Title: Great Product
Review: This is the second one of these I have purchased over the years.  I workout a lot and my Ipod goes with me every time.  This case stands up well to a lot of use.

Title: WHAT IS THIS???!!!!
Review: Wish I could give minus 5 stars!! This is the worst product I have ever gotten from amazon. Was looking forward to , as other comments say, a snugly jacket. Unfinished bottom totally thin. Got the white and it looks like a second hand bath robe! Ugh....

Title: What a disappointment
Review: I'm fairly certain that I purchased this product less than 6 months ago and already it has given up the ghost. I purchased with confidence since it has the Amazon brand and says "Apple certified." Boy was I wrong.

Title: Falls apart / flakes Review: Liked the case for a couple years but it eventually "dry rot" so now it flakes everywhere.

Fits very well, but had I known it would flake apart, I would have gotten a different one.

Still love the tablet.

Title: Joker Smile
Review: I am so surprised at how much I dislike this lipstick. Liquid matte lipstick is my usual go-to. And Nyx is one of the brands I reach for again and again. But I really hate this formula. You get tons of color payoff. I didn’t find it particularly patchy and when I first put it on, I was pretty excited and thought it would be love. However, it was pretty sticky. And then, when it wears off, the mess is completely unbearable! It shifts and slides as it comes off. Meaning it ends up all over your face. At first, I tried to just wipe it with a paper towel. Nope. Just smeared it more. So, I tried a wet paper towel. Nope. At this point, I’m looking very much like Joker. It requires actual makeup remover to get off. And I basically had to take off all my makeup because it just runs from your lips when you try to get it off. It was a nightmare. But it looked really dark and vivid until, you know, I had to use my mouth and sent it smearing everywhere.

Title: unimpressive
Review: they lose the stickiness on the pad too quickly.  lost one lens caps already.. not a happy camper at all

Title: Epilady 4 Legend
Review: Ok... I have little hair on my legs and... it's blonde.  So there's that.  But I LOVE this thing.  It pulls everything I want it to.  And then I'm good for several weeks.  It's not a clean, close shave like a razor.  It doesn't "cut" hair - it pulls it out.  I recommend using after a nice hot bath or shower.  Opens pores and it's less painful - but honestly, it doesn't hurt that much - and I'm a baby!  This one is a replacement for an older model that finally gave out and wouldn't charge any more - after about 8 years or so of use.  This one is a charger unit - so you plug it into charger, fully charge and you'll get around 30- 40 minutes of work.  I find it's enough to do both legs (calves, ankles, knees - I don't usually do my thighs) I don't recommend for underarms as underarm skin is too delicate and might get caught up in the device.  I suppose if you can hold your underarm skin really taunt you MIGHT be able to.  I think it's better to use a razor there or other hair remover cream - just my opinion.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Not much for the dark circles, but definitely a great moisturizer
Review: Nice, light moisturizing under eye skin cream. Goes on silky and is readily absorbed into the skin. I have been using it for several weeks now but, to be honest, I haven't seen any noticeable difference in my dark circles or fine lines. I do, however, feel a difference in the elasticity of my skin and there is a noticeable glow. Can't recommend this 100%, but it might work for you, so worth a try (even just for the improved moisturized and softness of your skin).

Title: Wow
Review: I got the color red hot. It was dark inside where the venue was so the color looks a smidge darker but it is a red with blue undertones. It reminds me of The Lip Bar’s Boy Trouble. If you want more of a cherry red, get Wicked. But I Loved this lipstick. It has nice slip when applied and stays like a dream!!  I had bbq ribs, collared greens and a drink in that picture and the color barely budged. There was zero transfer on my glass or fork or my teeth and still looked great for pictures. The longevity is astounding! It’s a dupe for Urban Decay Vice Lip Bond. I found it sticky the most when I applied a balm underneath it. Just apply one layer alone, and let it dry. The little stickiness after that felt more moisturizing than anything.  I came home, showered, washed off all of my makeup and it was still on!! U will Definitely need some makeup remover to remove efficiently. I used Vaseline because that’s all I had and it worked with some elbow grease. Anyway, I hope they come out with more colors! Definitely Buy These!!  And Stock Up!!

Title: Sound descent for the price.
Review: Sound isn't amazing but good. Seems like they could have made this much smaller and better quality sound. Very bulky. I don't need the light so it's non value add for me. Easy to connect with iPhone 6. Just not overly impressed with the sound. Bass seems a bit lacking when turned up loud. Easy to install, took me 20-30 min.

Title: No color
Review: You cant really tell its on not really worth the money

Title: Check your clearance.
Review: The connection ends are extremely thick so make sure you have clearance to fit them in. I was barely able to connect it to my Vizio sound bar. Other than that, the cable does what it's supposed to.

Title: Eh. It's alright.
Review: It seems to work and it covers the keyboard, it's just not as crisp as I would like. I want it to lay flat on the edges and look seamless, it doesn't but it's definitely not impeding my ability to use the keyboard.

Title: Leaves a tint
Review: It's okay, not hydrating enough. Have to apply frequently.

Title: Satisfied
Review: Works well

Title: Not bad lad! Review: It’s ok for home use
Iron or stream wrinkles

Title: darker colors are better for me Review: I wanted to try this new moisture stick and liked that the color was light. I will say that the "darker" cherry me is a bit better color. This color is slightly frosty, and lightens your lip. You should also know that all of these sticks have a slight smell to them... but it is not intense. Honestly, these sticks remind me a little of those "tinker bell" lip glosses you used to get when you were a preteen. :) That probably dates me. :) I just got them and I have to say I prefer the darker colors because the tint is a bit better for me, adding a bit of actual color. I don't think the moisture lasts "8 hours" as advertised, but I don't mind putting it on. The "peach" has the least amount of scent to me and it's not quite "peach"... it smells.. sweet.
Hope this helps!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Perfect!!!  Love my little elephant .

Title: pink flip flop
Review: These sandals are oddly too long... and slightly narrow.  They are pretty uncomfortable to wear.  I wanted them for particular outfit and they will work... but only for a few hours at the most.  The toe split is really uncomfortable (possibly trying to force your foot forward to fill all the length at the toe? ) and there are rough pieces on the upper, wider strips. And while the foot bed looks like it may be padded... it is VERY slightly.  If you just want a pretty pair of pink sandals to wear for a few hours once or twice a year - probably ok.  If you're planning to wear daily or weekly - I would not.  Just my opinion.

Title: Three Stars
Review: didn't have to use it

Title: silicon keyboard cover
Review: Oops.  I purchased the wrong cover for my laptop.  Pay careful attention to the right size.  Look at the photos and your keyboard to match them.  Had I done this I would have noticed this one was wrong.  Having said that - it would have been awesome had I purchased the right size.  It is clear-ish.  Soft and flexible as you would expect silicone to be.  I just want to eliminate stuff getting done in the cracks of the keyboard.  This would have worked well.  I have since gone back and ordered the right size.

Title: Great for travel
Review: The jars are just the perfect size to put vaseline, or lotion in to take on trips

Title: Ultra moisturizing but I do not care for the angel food flavor Review: There are 10 tubes of Chapstick in this package and they are all in the "angel food" flavor. It does not smell like angel food. I personally do not care for this flavor at all. However, I love how easily this glides on and how ultra-moisturizing it is. It actually lays down a thicker layer than their other Chapsticks. If I liked the flavor, this would have received 5 stars; however, since I do not, it gets 3 stars.

The current price of $15.83 comes to a slightly pricey $1.58 per tube.

Title: Amazingly softer, smoother and healthy skin after 2 weeks of daily use!
Review: I am a 62 year old woman who has been trying a variety of creams and lotions to help diminish the signs of aging on my hands to no avail. Although I have only been using this daily for a little over 2 weeks, I an honestly say the skin on my hands is visibly plumper and smoother (and definitely a lot healthier looking). This Pre de Provence product has a terrifically light citrus fragrance, goes on full but absorbs quickly into the skin (not sure if it's because my skin is so dry it 'drinks' it up readily) and overall is a great product to use. The argan oil assures that your skin will be soft and smooth. I love someone's review on here that talks about the price of this product. Honestly, if $15 is too much to keep your skin looking youthful and healthy, then I guess you shouldn't be buying any skin products. This Pre de Provence is a great product and a little goes a long way.

Title: Fragrance is overwhelming and chemical to my nose Review: There are three 3.25 ounce tubes in this package.

The balm goes on easily and melts (as can be seen from the picture) into the skin from the heat of one's body. I applied this both in the evening after my shower and in the morning after another shower.  This product actually kept me from sleeping well the entire night because the fragrance is incredibly overwhelming and it is also chemical smelling (almost like Raid insect spray) to my nose.  I love fragrance and always feel the more overpowering the better, but not in this case.

This deodorant "protects" as a result of the intense fragrance.  I doubt body odor sweat can overpower this aroma. I personally never get results from any product except those that contain 17% or more of aluminum. Nevertheless, I can attest that it produces results and a "scent" headache in my case.

This is not for me. The price of $21.98 is competitive for three. Since a lot is dispensed as it easily melts on during application, it will probably not last as long as other deodorant.

Title: Kinda small!
Review: I realized that this says one size fits all, or most, but this was super small when my husband put it on! He thought I had gotten him a youth size! He’s loved Carhartt stuff forever so I had to try it out. That’s his only complaint!

Title: Seems pretty good, but pump won’t pop Up! Review: I like the ingredance in this, but it’s hard to use cause the pump won’t pop up!
I have to unscrew the bottle to use this! I think trying to pop the pump 100 times, hubby worked
On it, and when my daughter came over she gave it a try, never could get this pump working..
The lotion is thick and seems pretty good, But!

Title: No hassels, great service!
Review: Purchased an ipad for 10year old grandson along with the most sturdy case I could find.  Wisely purchased the 3 year protection plan and had to take advantage of it twice so far.  Once I filed my claim, a label was emailed to me so I could mail the ipad to them for repair.  Quick turn around, grandson happy!  I would wholeheartedly recommend this company to anyone.  Great service.

Title: Great Price
Review: Unfortunately, half of these lasted less than a month. The others are still working though, so I split the difference and gave an average rating. Received fast and exactly as described. Even with only 3 working, it's still a great price.

Title: Eh
Review: It's ok. I don't see any difference really. Maybe it isn't made for oily skin?

Title: Needs a "finer point" Review: This stylus is not my favorite but its ok as a back up. It seems to be thicker and I am not able to control it as well as some others but for a back up, its ok.

(Hard to write a review for an "it's just ok" product)

Title: green glitter lace up shoes
Review: What a HUGE disappointment!  I purchased these for a Christmas costume worn once a year - thus the need for green.  These shoes are NOT green they are BLUE with slight shimmery green overtone.  NOTHING like the photo on the ad. SOOO disappointed.  In the donate bag they go.  What a waste of money.  They are cheap - but for my use that was going to be fine.  The shoe laces are green but that is just not enough.

Title: Hard to Open, Water Tight Review: I can attest to the water resistant nature of this case. I tested it for well over an hour in the kitchen sink as well as at approximately three feet deep in our pool for a period of at least fifteen or twenty minutes. Both times several paper towels placed in the case beforehand came out completely dry.

As other reviewers have mentioned this case is insanely hard to open. I guess that's a good thing meaning the seal it tight but I would hate to have to move a Kindle in and out of this as due to the weight and design I would only want my device in this type of case when such protection was necessary.

Title: Perfect
Review: The reversible belt is perfectly sized and beautiful looking. I love it.

Title: Not bad for the price, but has design issue
Review: For the price it is not a bad blu ray and certainly in the past few weeks the price has dropped further.  The boot up time is less than one minute and plays the disc almost instantaneously.  It has optionalities that are now offered by so many of the new LEDs that their operating system is a lot faster than the player, so not a huge plus for us.  There is one real poor design feature that we were surprised to see it on these modern days of DVD players: the wireless dongle sticks out at the front of the player and it really looks poor aesthetically and we wished it was shorter or have it at the back of the player?

Title: Runs large but seems well made Review: I have a 24" waist, ordered an xxs. They are big but i can make them work with the included belt. They are warm and seem well constructed. Due to being so big be they make a weird noise when I walk and the legs rub together. I bought these for field work on cold, damp days. I wish they sold smaller sizes. Calling pants with a 28" waist extra extra small is a little ridiculous.

I wore these into a pool of water while doing fieldwork in 40F weather. The water rolled right off the outer layer, the fleece got wet (obviously, these are pants not waders) but stayed warm and dried fast. I'm really glad to have these and I will be wearing them on future expeditions. I think they would also be good for hiking in wet, cold weather.

Title: Beautiful
Review: This is a beautiful cover. It seems pretty sturdy. Time will tell

Title: Great Wireless...  Not 10/100/1000 speeds for wired.
Review: As a wireless router... top notch for today's current standards in the home with good range.  What shocked me (and it was my fault for not checking the specs) was the wired speeds are only 10/100.  You would think for a router that is boasting the top wireless speeds, then the wired speeds would be at least the current faster standards.  I did not think to keep all the boxes for a return or I would.  I setup the wireless and was thrilled, I just assumed all was right in the world, so I tossed all the boxed.  Days later I realized my internal LAN speeds were not up to par with my cat 6 wiring.  Well, it is still new, but eBay here is comes.

Review: Watch has silver face and silver hands not good for me ordered different watch

Review: It's a very light, nylonish slippery fabric.  I'm disappointed.
