Review: Favorite soap at a good price.

Title: Too small
Review: Way too small. I ordered 2t for my average sized 18 month old. The shorts were tight around his waist and the shirt was a belly shirt.

Title: didn't work
Review: The device operates on batteries or USB power cord (adapter not included). The batteries not included, I put 4 new Amazon AA batteries in and NOTHING. Hooked up the USB cord and it worked. The dimmer function worked great but the light was surprisingly not super bright as my more traditionally built makeup mirrors are. The size is smaller than I have, best for travel. I think a better model would have 10x and 20x magnification on the side mirrors for the 40 and over users.

Title: They tore up before I put them on the hair
Review: Cheaply made

Title: Power strip
Review: Good basic value

Title: Moisturized my face and neck but I can’t stand the fragrance
Review: The fragrance of this cream is such a turn off to me that I only used it once. I rubbed this over my face and neck and it is very moisturizing and absorbs quickly. However, I love fragrance but this one is just terrible. I wish I could describe the scent but I can't. It makes me want to run. The current price of $36 is also pricey for this. If the fragrance was to my liking, I would have rated this 4 stars. If both the fragrance was better and the price was under $30, I would have rated this 5 stars.

Title: True to size, comfortable for all day wearing
Review: Really nicely made quality shoes.  Stitches are tight and color (blue) is a beautiful hue. Shoes fit perfectly. My son, who's a school teacher, does a lot of walking throughout the day and told me that after wearing these for a week non-stop, his feet had no pain (he has high arches) and actually felt supported and relaxed. I highly recommend these for everyday or more dressy wear.

Title: Cute
Review: Adorable outfit, well made.

Title: Just ok
Review: These are just ok for me. They are nice material and thickness and look nice on, but they fall down a bit and I have to pull them up constantly. I have a couple pairs of C9 champion leggings and I like those a lot more. Also prefer a higher waist.

Title: Convenient warming mask but a washcloth w/warm water is so much better Review: This is like a hand warmer for the eyes. There is no steam and not much value to this in my opinion. The only value is the convenience of an eye-warming mask when no warm water washcloth is available.

As per the instructions, I opened the mask which causes it to heat up. I then hooked the ear holes around my ears and laid down for 20 minutes with this on my eyes. It should not be pressed to the eyes. After 20 minutes, I removed it. Note the mask still remained warm for about 5 more minutes.  Upon removal, my eyes were lightly burning as if I got soap in my eyes. My lids felt moist but I would not call it steam. I personally feel a washcloth soaked in very warm water and placed on the eyelids is a much better solution.

This mask contains iron powder, activitate carbon, and water.

In summary, this product's only redeeming value is the convenience of having a warming mask when there is no warm water or washcloth available.

Title: Not powerful enough.
Review: My mistake. It’s just not meeting my needs for the kitchen appliances nor power chair. I think I’ll have to return it.

Title: This is definitely not unscented but it does moisturize Review: The description says that this is unscented and that is not true. Perhaps it means no fragrance is added; however, it smells a bit like bacon grease to me. I personally do not like this scent.

This is a little greasy as it sinks into the skin. It does moisturize but the aroma prevents me from putting this on any body area other than my feet and hands. If this did not smell so bad, it would have gotten 4 stars from me. If it had a little less greasy feeling and also did not smell, then it would have received 5 stars.

Title: Great little speaker
Review: I would never use it in my shower, so I can only tell you it is great in dry places. Great loud sound.

Title: Best hair coloring experience I have had.
Review: Worked wonderful. One thing most people had issues with I noticed was with the mixture being runny. I let it sit the max amount of time before applying (24) hours and the texture was perfect. I added Tea instead of water, and essential oils for smell. Then after I washed it out to help with the bold natural henna smell I rubbed essential oils in my hair. I am delighted this is a 3 pack!

Title: No-frills straightener with temp from 250 to 500 degrees; I am unsure when it reaches temp Review: The current price of $18.99 ($28.99 minus $10 coupon) is reasonable for this flat iron.

The iron's controls are on the interior of the blades, so it can be difficult to adjust. However, many flat irons have this feature. There is a wheel temperature dial that goes from 250 to 500 degrees Fahrenheit but there is no LED readout. This means I never know when it reaches that temperature because the red light stays on all the time when the unit is turned on.

The cord has a 360 swivel to prevent tangling, which I love. Also, the alignment of the plates is spot on--not too tight or too loose.

I used it to straighten my hair and it did an okay job. I had to do a lot of passes because the plate is only 3.5" long.

In summary, this is an okay one inch flat iron. The iron itself works but it is basic and I do not like that I cannot tell when the plates have heated up to the set temperature. The results are satisfactory but nothing outstanding. The iron's best feature is its swivel cord. It also comes with a 1-year warranty.

Title: Nice body brush but not as easy to hold as others I tried Review: This "brush head" with a hanging loop is not as easy to hold as others I tried because there is no handle or cloth loop around the brush head. Nevertheless, this is still functional. The brush bristles are soft/medium and are sturdy enough to be exfoliating and cleaning yet somewhat gentle enough not to be irritating.

I love brushes like these as wet brushes for the shower even though these are not what they are designed for.

The current price of $12.99 is a bit pricey for this as there are others with a handhold that are much cheaper, such as this [[ASIN:B0B28QKRLN set]].

Title: Not for me
Review: This does not fit into my new Fire 8 HD tablet. The cord provided is a little short.

Title: The buckle broke off after very little wear.
Review: They weren't the most comfortable, but they looked nice. My granddaughter has only worn them a few times. She used them for dressing up and not for play. The metal clasp broke today and there's no way to fix it. The METAL broke.  It's very cheap almost like tin foil.  I doubt they last anyone very long as this part must be bucked and unbuckled causing a stress fracture after very little use.  I wouldn't recommend these shoes.

Title: Not worth it.
Review: They broke in 3 days from hitting the corner of a wooden table.

Title: Awesome product
Review: I love these with the magnet attachment !! I have a kindle and the charger cord is loose in the socket so I used this Because of the little magnet that you use for the charging slot. It's save's My kindle charging opener From getting damaged even more because the magnetic cord grabs on right away. This is a great product I wish I would have had it a while ago.The cords come in different lengths Which is nice.

Title: WORTHLESS
Review: Does not blow cold air

Title: Strong Smell
Review: I love a nice, strong scented lotion, but I wasn't crazy about this berry scented lotion. The scent is strong and a bit artificial in my opinion. It's not a foul smell, but it's over powering and lingers for a while. The lotion is thin and a bit runny. It does absorb well and it does leave behind soft hands. It's okay, but the strong scent is just too much for me.

Title: Great lipstick, long lasting, full coverage!
Review: FIrst, I have to say that I love this style and make of lipstick. First, it fits easy in your hand and allows you total control when applying. Second, it lasts and lasts. I am hard on lipstick color as I have a tendency to drink a lot of water (or whatever else is around) and between talking on the phone all day and licking my lips, I tend to have to reapply often. This FocusOn brand is different, it lasts me all day with only a quick touch up usually after lunch. I actually did not care for this color (too dark and copper looking for me). However, I did order another color shortly after receiving and trying this and I am using this brand exclusively now. I highly recommend FocusOn (a brand I had never heard of before) Color Sticks and know it will become your new favorite go to lip color.

Title: Nice, stretchy underwear but rolls over onto itself periodically & runs small
Review: I usually take a medium (size 6) but this large (size 7) fits me perfectly which tells me this runs small. This feels very comfortable on and has a "barely there look" but  it does roll over every now and then. On the plus side it does not ride up. If the waist did not sometimes ride down, this would have gotten four stars. If it were true to size, it would have gotten five stars.

Title: Quality item-runs big
Review: The fabric and feel of the shirt is good. I ordered a small, and I'd say the small fits more like a medium so it was too big for me.

Title: USB cord type C
Review: My husband needed this for a special charger and reports it works exactly as it should.

Title: Watch the installation video Review: This Product was exactly as described and the installation video helped but Aligning
the Protector on the screen wasn't quite a easy as i'm used to on a smaller device such
as my phones. It's good thing they give you 3 in the pack So when you miss the alignment with the first one
you have 2 more to get it right. Otherwise it's a Good product.

Title: Worth it! Improved streaming capabilities!
Review: Did the trick! Solid Bars, holy cow. Does exactly as says.

Title: Thick, hydrating cream; takes a while to absorb and dries slightly tacky; love the jar Review: This cream is thick and more of an opaque white. It is scentless and goes on easily. I applied this to my face and neck and it took about 5 minutes to absorb; however, it never fully absorbed and left a slight tacky feeling behind. Nevertheless, my face was extremely hydrated and this provided a protective barrier on my skin. I consider this more of a winter lotion.

What I love the most about this is the jar it comes in. Everything is hinged including the interior protective cap. There is also a plastic applicator provided. If this cream did not dry tacky, it would have received 4 stars. If it were also cheaper than the current $65 and it were not tacky, it would have received 5 stars. I expect a cream like this to go for $45 or less and not dry with a tacky feel.

Title: Pulling beard, battery is not working strong - update less then a month- Stop working. Review: Update- don’t waste your money, Stop working in less then a Month.
———-
This electric razor for men might work Better if your shaving your head!
My son didn’t shave for 3 days When he used this shaver it felt it was pulling on his
Beard. He kept using this for about two weeks everyday and now the battery is wearing down!

Title: Used this one time, and now does not work, and no more pencil Review: I received L'Oreal infallible black eye pencil, and a very nice double pencil sharpener, which was a big mistake!
I put the eye liner on, and it went on pretty smooth, looked good. This pencil color of black is very dark.
I decided to use the sharpener! It ruined the pencil as after I used it, I realized this pencil is plastic cut into it, and has nothing to
Do with this pencil, and After I was wondering why the sharpener was included in the packge!
The top of the pencil turns, and I expected more pencil would come out, it did not!

My eye pencil is Ruined, and there is no black pencil in it to use.
I hope this does not happen to anyone else.

Title: Really nice fragrant moisturizing soap
Review: Nice size bar of soap with a lot of botanical ingredients. I love the fragrance, it's light but makes the shower fragrant and fun. I love the fruit and vegetable extracts, makes me feel I am doing something good and natural for my skin.  After using several times already, my skin feels soft and smooth and the smell lingers lightly. Not sure if $7 is too much for this soap (I can buy a package of soaps for this price) but it is the ingredients that make this special. Recommend!

Title: Not for short people
Review: I bought a size 18 based on their measurements, the inseam IS NOT a 31". I'm 5'5" and even with my 4 inch heels they dragged on the floor! The kicker is the seller charges you for  UPS return label to ship back to them! This was their error in listing the jeans actual length incorrectly, so when you have to send them back - they make YOU pay for their mistake! AVOID!

Title: Looks and feels cakey & heavy.. Review: I have only been using La Roche-Posay for a few days.
My skin is a bit oily, and I'm older.

I found this to be drying, looked cakey, and felt heavy on my face. Which makes me look older.
This has a very light wonderful scent to it.

I think my Olay Total effects, pore minimizer is more of Moisturizer, 15spf, with a nice lite coverage is by far better for me. (Got it from Amazon)
Going to keep trying this when I don't go out. If I found this gets better with time, I will be back for a different review.

Title: Definite improvement in my skin
Review: For the positives, my skin, after using, feels smooth and soft and definitely hydrated and glowing. For the negatives, I didn't find the application that easy (sheets are wet and sides stick together making it awkward to get it on my face) and the fragrance to me (during application) was kind of strong. I will recommend to anyone who wants their skin to feel and look better, just think they could have done a better and easier way to apply it (and toned down the scent a bit).

Title: One Star
Review: made my skin really dry and flaky

Title: Cute hoodie
Review: Adorable hoodie. My granddaughter is 2 but because of the reviews I sized up to a 3T and it fits perfectly with enough room to be comfortable. She loved it.

Title: Perfect!!!
Review: Absolutely adorable and I love my new nightgown!!! It’s so pretty and tempted to get another one with a different pattern!!! TY TY TY!

Title: COOFANDY VEST GREAT ESPECIALLY PRICED
Review: My husband looks amazing in this vest! I was so happy the fit was as described. I thought the price was excellent for the quality. I so for can not find anything wrong husband 6'2 210lbs Ridem cowboy

Title: 4X fits like a 2x, and no room for a big butt Review: So I had really high hopes for these leggings. Ive moved to a much colder, northern state after ten years in the south US, and wanted some nice leggings. Mine were falling apart anyway, so why not these. Im usually a 3X, sometimes a 4X depending on the brand, so I went with the 4X. If they were too big, I thought I'd throw them in the dryer.

I was SO excited to try them on, but when i pulled them on, they barely went past my thighs. Half my backside was hanging out, and I still had five inches of legging hanging off my feet. I thought "well they must be caught on something" Nope. "They must be the wrong size..." Nope! All the tags, stickers and labels said 4X.

Long story short, Im returning them. If youre a size 24 or 26, and/or have a rather full butt, give these a pass. Two stars because like... the material is great. Its super soft. But god... I dont know on what planet a 4X fits like a 2X.

Title: Moisturizing lip balm from Korea; a bit pricey Review: At the current price of $11.99 ($12.99 minus $1), this lip balm is a bit pricey. I would expect that it would be $6 or less for this amount. Nevertheless, this is moisturizing and feels good on my lips. It does not feel waxy like other lip balms but more like Vaseline on the lips. I have no idea why they put a tab on the label so that it can be peeled off. I like that feature but others might not want something with no label on it.

In summary, this is nice lip balm but way too pricey.

Title: Great matte lipstick, lasts all day.
Review: Great long lasting lipstick. Rated this as a four star simply because I send to prefer more glossy lipsticks (I actually apply a clear gloss over this when I use it). This is a flat full coverage lipstick, made by Maybelline so you know the price will be good and the quality is there. It does last throughout the day (I apply it in the morning and it does last until I am finished from work in spite of eating and drinking). I recommend this to anyone who wants a matte finish lipstick in a handy applicator package that will last them throughout the day.

Title: FITS PRO4, STYLUS, & KEYBOARD PERFECTLY 10/17 UPDATE Review: WELL MADE, GREAT PROTECTION FOR MY SURFACE PRO4 INCLUDING THE KEYBOARD AND STYLUS. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
UPDATE OCTOBER 23, 2017
I NOTICED A FEW WEEKS AGO THAT THE FOLIO STAND WAS COMING APART! I TAKE EXCEPTIONAL CARE OF MY ELECTRONIC ITEMS AND STORE THEM IN CASES AND IN A TRAVEL BAG. THE FOLIO SEAM IS GLUED AND HAS SEPARATED!
*AS A RESULT I HAVE LOWERED MY RATING FROM 5 STARS TO 2 STARS,*

Title: Worth it
Review: Looks really cool when lights shining. It is easy to scratch and where it gets scratched its not reflective and looks black.

Title: Clips
Review: Love the color and the clips work well.

Title: really baggy/
Review: There wasn't any specific sizing info on these shorts, but they run large and very baggy in the rear and legs and seemed extra long for my taste. I am NOT a size 8 but these made me look like I was a size 26.  The material was light and comfortable.  They were just really unflattering on me.  I am about 5'9" and a women's 14/16.

Title: NOT GOOD
Review: This nail polish is so small, looks like it for a doll. I put on 3 coats and I can still see my nail through the polish. The bottle does not seem to hold enough to paint 10 fingers over three coats. I would not recommend this product as it does not look good. And it would take too many coats to get to the correct color. The bottles are way to small. Never seen anything like it.

Title: Great cleanser!
Review: Removes makeup and dirt like magic.

Title: Does work even if your TV has Google voice.
Review: It's works on the TV I needed it for. Even tho the TV has Google voice and the remote doesn't.

Title: Smells & lathers okay; cleans well; bar is a bit slippery Review: There is one thin bar of soap in this package. The aroma is detergent-like. This soap lathers okay and cleans well. Due to its small size,it ordinarily would be easy to hold but since the bar is slippery, it has a tendency to slip out of my hands periodically. Nevertheless, I did not notice it to " minimize expression lines and wrinkles, age spots, sagging skin, and collagen loss and control the premature aging process" as claimed on the Amazon site.

The current price of $8.45 is pricey for this.

Title: kids love them!
Review: So cute,kids love them!!

Title: I love the fragrance of this bubble bath and it cleans well but the tops don't work
Review: I love the fragrance of this bubble bath. The rose water is my favorite. I also feel clean after using this. This is a very nice set. At the current price of $11.79, this comes to a reasonable $5.90 per 13 fluid ounce bottle. What I also love about these is the tassels that come with the bottles. I can use those to decorate a purse or keyring. However, I am very upset that the tops on either bottle do not work. Instead, I have to remove the caps and pour out the bubble bath. I cannot recommend these for that reason.

Title: Manicure bench is narrow, tall, slippery, & it smells Review: At the current price of $17.29, this manicure bench is more reasonably priced than a competitor with the same bench. The quality of the workmanship is pretty good but the legs elevate this bench about 5.25" off the ground. Since the bench is narrow on top, the person leaning their hands may have a tendency to tip this over. In addition, there are no rubber feet on the "legs." As a result, it is necessary to put a towel under this bench to keep it from slipping when placed on a solid non-stick surface.

Other than this, this bench is very nice. If it were lower to the ground, about two inches wider, and had rubberized feet on the bottom, this would have received 5 stars. In its current state it is functional but not the best it could be. The fact that it smells is also bothersome to me. I suppose it could double as a child's pretend ironing board.

Title: Sizing is completely off for this the size XL is like an S or M.
Review: Bought this a while ago and it was wayyy too small just in general the size looked as if made for teenagers not for adults. Or maybe asian size not sure the point being it literally did not close but not at all and I ordered the biggest size there was available I am not thattt big though and I noticed it was extremely tight at the top. When I tried to check if I could just wear it as a vest even or maybe wait it out see if I could just lose some weight it just didn't work out at all I really think it was extremely thin and in fact I would say this was a size M or even S in some way not at all as described. The material itself isgood though just the sizing is completely off. The top doesn't close at all and it's not for curvy people either just very strange fitting. But at least I could return it so that's good and if you don't have any curves you might find it even flattering maybe.

Title: One Star
Review: The large is made for AA

Title: Cotton material is different and a bit rough.Thinner than expected
Review: Own other shirts by same brand and they are not similar. These hold static and are thin. Cotton material is different and a bit rough.

Title: No radio
Review: Thought this had built in fm radio.I wanted for yard mowing but no radio.

Title: Gorgeous earrings
Review: I bought the 1.5 carat earrings and they are the perfect size. I have been wearing them for a day and a half and my ears have not bothered me at all. In fact, I forgot that I have been wearing them. Excellent purchase.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Liked it just wish it had one for other ear,

Title: vanity fair zoned in support
Review: I had hoped this bra would offer a fuller cup than the front closure version of this exact bra, it does not.  I wish they offered a DDD.  I ordered the 38DD hoping the different style of this bra would be the difference.  The front closure version of this bra does not have the wider straps (but they aren't skinny straps either) that this one does... and this one offers a wider back with many hooks - about 3 1/2 - 4".  The front closure version is "convertible" to a "x" back.  Obviously, this one is not convertible but does offer wider straps - thus I was thinking this would be a fuller cup, fuller figure bra.. but nope...  There is an underwire.  But if you need a fuller cup bra - this one is sadly disappointing.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful - and hope this info is helpful.

Title: Eh
Review: Comfy but odd length and see through. Major side boob as well

Title: Three Stars
Review: This was difficult to cut to fit the laptop.

Title: Fascinator hat for tea party, Kentucky derby
Review: This fascinator is beautiful on. It is easily worn with headband or clip provided. I’m using it for a Kentucky Derby themed party

Title: Without a case on the table to balance weight with ... Review: Without a case on the table to balance weight with the flap
it will fall over. It is okay but could have been stronger.

Title: Unsafe text Review: The look of this is very cool
Retro-chic and so old-school
Great for teacher/boss misleading
"Wow! She made notes - and she's reading!!"

The problem with the Verso Trends
Is that the cover twists and bends
Because it's mostly pliant plastic
With corner straps made of elastic

If by chance it takes a fall
There's no protection there at all
Without a strap to keep it shut
Your Kindle may just go kaput

In short, this cover's just for looks
To stash your Kindle with your books
A talking point, I will admit
But otherwise, it's just a nostalgic gimmick that's really cute, but not terribly durable*.

*(Not the last line you were expecting)

Amanda Richards, December 27, 2012

Title: Extremely moisturizing, glides on smooth, nice coral pink color, but wears off easily Review: This review is for the "Beautiful Rosewood" color.

This lipstick is like lip balm with color. It is incredibly moisturizing but has to be applied often. The white center, I assume, is the moisturizer with the color on the exterior. It glided on my lips like a dream and felt so good on. However, it does not last at all. Within about 2 hours or less it wore off even if I did not eat or drink anything. 

The coral pink color is attractive on my fair skin and it is shinier than a matte finish, which provides a nice "glow" to the lips. If this lasted longer on my lips, I would have rated this higher.

Title: Not nude at all
Review: Product not as described. It’s definitely not a nude lipstick, it’s a nice color, but leans to berry.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Beautiful and lots of room. Exactly what I expected.

Title: Nice soft headbands; but they sent 2 yellow instead of the purple Review: These headbands are soft and very nice. There are nine of them and they are all supposed to be different colors. Unfortunately, I was sent two yellow (which is a color I'm not fond of) instead of the purple one.

These feel soft and are not tight around the head which is great. When a headband is too tight, then it usually pops off but this one does not. In general, I actually love these.

Not only am I disappointed that one of the colors advertised was not included, but they put in a note to rate the headbands five stars to get a $1 coupon on the next order.

Title: Really nice type of eyeshadow
Review: As far as this eyeshadow brand goes....eyeshadow is super easy to apply, pencil is ergonomically fit in my hand and is easy to maneuver. Shadow is long lasting. I am deducting a star for the color of angelic. It is very pale, difficult to see, and not light enough to be used as a highlighter (it's almost a flesh color). I recommend this brand and the stick style of application, but I think if you are looking for something to highlight your eyes, you might want to chose another color in their palette of choices.

Title: cleansing water
Review: It's tough on eyes so try not to get it in your eyes... it feels greasy.. and I didn't think it was easy to rinse off.  It took off waterproof eye makeup... but overall... I didn't like how the "after" was... greasy.  Just my opinion.  Everyone likes something different!  I guess I was taken in by the name "cleansing water".... but it should say "cleansing - stay on for hours - oil."

Title: Just ok.
Review: Ordered an extra small and it's a little baggy. It also smells horrible. I will keep it because overtime I think it will shrink and the smell will subside. It's a pretty decent material for the price, not super flimsy.

Title: Not great
Review: I bought a different one in green, maybe from a different seller I really can't recall but I can tell you this one while it looks nice does pill, it was slightly smaller in size even though I ordered a 2x - was more like a 1x.  Anyway after a couple washings and the pilling I had to discard it.

Title: Awesome Watch
Review: Great for tracking fitness and its Strava compatible

Title: Five Stars
Review: awesome

Title: It's okay
Review: I thought it would help stop my itchy scalp, but it didn't

Title: Comfy too
Review: Excellant quality, and duriblity

Title: ok as a usb
Review: Bought this to transfer pictures from a samsung phone to my computer, but it didnt work . So now I use it as a USB, typical usage stores a lot of data

Title: For the money, this is a great wristlet/purse!
Review: I was in the market for a new purse to use at night when I go out that is easy to carry and easy to store. This wristlet is much, much nicer than I was expecting. I love the credit card slots so I don't to carry my entire wallet and it has a zippered area for my phone and cash. I have already ordered this in red as I think it would look great with one of my outfits. For $15, this is absolutely money well spent. Just keep in mind that the hardware is gold colored (not silver as it seems to appear in the pictures). I would have really liked silver as most of my jewelry is usually silver, but outside of that, I am very happy with this!

Title: Leaves my face soft but I dislike the gel texture & product packaging is too big for product within Review: When I received this, I thought some product was missing. As can be seen in the photo, the tube is only half full. However, it was unopened and I assume it is the tube that is just too big making it seem like half the product is gone.

I washed my face with this. I love the menthol-like fragrance and even like the exfoliating properties. However, the gel texture is slimy and I really dislike that. Also, after I wash it off my face, my eyes start to burn just a bit.

After having tried this, I would never order this again as the texture of the gel portion is a complete turnoff.

Title: Handle with care
Review: The unit broke first time I attempted to rotate it.

Title: Runs small
Review: The size runs small and needs more arch support and softer insoles.

Title: Nice design but material is meh
Review: It fits a bit tight and the material feels like paper. Aside from that it looks really good. It would be a good shirt for something more formal or if you need a black shirt for work.

Title: Like other things Netgear, it kind of works for a while and then it dies Review: I had a Netgear MR814 that worked half-decently for around four years and then for some reason totally stopped transmitting internet wirelessly. Bought this new one through Amazon for $40 and it worked OK for a few months before it stopped transmitting internet as well. So I bought a Linksys instead and there's a stark difference. No more restarting my router every other day to get it to work, and NO MORE NETGEAR FOR ME! There's a reason I guess why their routers are less expensive. Do yourself a favor and pay the extra ten dollars for another brand like Linksys.

If you do buy this one note that when I followed the instructions on the included setup CD it didn't work. When I just did the setup manually it worked fine. If you know anything at all about wireless routers then I suggest you set it up manually without the CD.

Title: A hit
Review: My daughter loved these, especially because they had zippers instead of snaps. I thought they were really cute.  Thank you.

Title: cable works.
Review: purchased as a back for the Fire box.  Works like other HDMI cables... I am not sure say more than that. If there are issues I will update this review.

Title: Not for me,,just vibrates. Waste of plastic and electricity to recharge,
Review: Meh.  It vibrates and doesn’t rotate at all.  Unlike other face cleanser, you have a vibrating brush and you need to put some elbow grease to brush your face.  Waste and unearth friendly.  Oi wish designers are pushing out junk into the world.  If this rotated..it would have been a game changer with its small ergonomic size.

Title: Beautiful
Review: I don’t normally let my hair grow long, but with Covid-19 shutting everything down, I desperately needed something to put my hair up with.  These clips are beautiful and strong and just the right size.

Title: Computer
Review: Amazing

Title: It works!
Review: BUT it is not quite the correct fit, Sad to say, but ordering is so difficult the descriptions are questionable.

Title: Many compliments
Review: This fits as expected and is comfortable to wash and wear.  BUT wash it inside out to ensure the stencils remain in tact.  I've gotten many compliments from family, friends and an animal rescue organization.  It's a keeper.

Title: It was not wide enough and you did not have ...
Review: It was not wide enough and you did not have anything wider. I have another pair and it is a 12/1/2 eee

Title: Washes and lathers well but the fragrance is not my favorite
Review: This washes and lathers well but the fragrance is not my favorite. The lather is not excessive but good enough. The aroma is hard for me to describe; I think it is the "cotton" part of the fragrance that I do not care for. I felt clean after using this. The only reason I would not buy this particular one is due to the fragrance but that is personal taste only. Based on the current reviews, it certainly seems everyone else loves the smell.

Title: Not what I expect from Burt's Bees
Review: Typically I like the Burt;s Bees product, but I have been using this now for a few weeks and haven't noticed any difference. I also find the fragrance to be a bit strong for me. I am rating as three stars simply because they typically make great products and I am thinking it might be my skin type where I am not seeing a difference. It does go on light and smooth and it is reasonably priced. I guess you could try to see if it works for you, but it didn't for me.

Title: Very small, faint light that barely reaches past the little fixture Review: We have several different types of lights from Mr Beams in the garage and outside n several locations. All are battery powered and use motion to come on - the outside spotlights are really bright and dependable. I was expecting the same from these little lights and they aren't really fulfilling my expectations.

These are much smaller than the photos show - just under 2 inches wide actually. On the one hand that tiny size means you can install them just almost anywhere, but that also means there is almost no useable light from these. I wanted to use them in the halls just outside the guestroom doors to guide guests.

The light is very faint and barely lluminates the fixture, never mind where to step on the floor below. I moved them to the bathroom where the light can reflect in the big mirror and that's a definite improvement. I'm going to stick with the regular old plug in nightlights for inside the house and leave Mr Beams to do outdoor spotlights.

Title: Great every day moisturizer!
Review: I really like this Jurlique rose cream moisturizer. Typically, I don't like rose scented products because they usually make the scent too strong. This Jurlique is different. Lightly fragranced, it doesn't conflict with any scent I may wear. It goes on smooth and luxurious and absorbs quickly into my skin. I can apply my makeup right after application with no problems I have been using this for about a month now and my skin does feel softer and smoother.

Title: Great quality and more stations than bunny ears
Review: I purchased this for my Nana who is 94 yrs old and doesn’t have cable. It was simple to set up (follow instructions on TV settings to setup) and my nana now has more stations and way better quality visually as well as for listening because the stations no longer go in and out! Definitely worth the money.

Title: Great value
Review: Great Value but came with no instructions

Title: Color is different
Review: Nice but more of a grey and purple not khaki

Title: Total waste of money!!!
Review: These iron on labels did NOT stay on at the very first washing. I am extremely disappointed.  I live in a care facility,  and if your name is not secure on all items, especially laundry items, as mine were, they can get lost; also as mine were. What's the point of having iron on labels if they don't stay ON??🤬

Title: Okay Review: Hard to put the batteries in and the back part for the batteries keeps failing off.
My son loves it and it has good reception.

Title: This shampoo cleans well but is very watery and not super sudsy; love the scent Review: I paired this shampoo with their [[ASIN:B07G1JHYVY frizz-taming conditioner]]. This arrived well-packaged so that no shampoo leaked out. There's an internal seal and the pump mechanism has to be inserted once the seal is broken.

I love the lavender fragrance. However, what I do not like is that this is very watery. It has no consistency to it at all. As a result, I did not get the copious amount of suds I expect from a shampoo. I did feel it cleaned my hair very well. I also felt it controlled the frizz as I used it on a rainy day.

Unfortunately, this does not have the consistency and suds that I desire in a shampoo but the fragrance is wonderful and it ships well as packaged.

Title: died in three months
Review: I didn't do anything to it, I took care of it, but it died in three months too late for a refund but not worth three months of usage. I won't buy used from these guys again.

Title: Did nothing.
Review: Didnt moisture my face in any way.

Title: Liked the idea until I read ingredients
Review: Liked the idea until I read ingredients. It contains Aspartame, an artificial sweetener which is some are allergic to. Would NOT have ordered had a common allergen been listed. Yup, folks lick their lips!

Title: Fresh Cotton fragrance oil
Review: I purchased this for drops on my wool dryer balls.  They list the scent as fresh cotton - however, to me it smells like baby powder.  Eh.  It's a small bottle.  I may gift it to someone else.  I am not a fan of baby powder scent.

Title: These are ok.
Review: These aren't great. They are ok.  They definitely won't work against a virus, but they will serve in satisfying the mask mandate.

Title: hdmi cable adapter
Review: Husband needed for some audio purpose and he says it worked as it should.

Title: Just what I was looking for. Review: I give it 5 stars with 2 caveats. First, it's not stated in the description that it recognizes fewer formats when in BT mode and the instructions seem to be lacking in detail, so it took a while to figure out how to access all of the functions. Hint: You can only access playback functions while in BT because BT, itself, is a sub-folder, so you have to back out of BT to do other things.

Ultimately, I gave it 5 stars because a) i had just a few songs in the missing formats and b) once I got past the navigation issues, it works quite well and the company was very helpful when I needed them.

Update: Turns out as I loaded more music I found a lot more music that wasn't found while in BT, including some albums where some of the songs appeared and some didn't. Al in all, it's kind of clumsy to navigate in BT and BT was the feature I wanted most.

However, it sounds good with the earbuds that they provide and it's size makes it convenient. The 8gb are plenty if you don't have a lot of music. I do, so I added a 32gb sd mini-card which is as large as it will take.

Title: Ok but not great
Review: It's an "ok" but not great player. Sound isn't the best but not the worst either, irregardless the equalizer setting. Seems cheaply made. Buttons are "squishy". Directions aren't the best so getting around the menu presents learning that is trial and error. Once you figure it all out it's pretty easy.

Title: Wonderful, light smelling soap. Great cleaning quality and wonderful invigorating fragrance!
Review: I love this soap. I love the fresh earthy smell, the way it makes my skin feel (not dry, but super clean). The shower smells wonderful while I bathe and it does make me feel good. Not sure about the 'energy boosting' qualities but I love the way it makes me feel and smell during and after my shower. This is my all time favorite bar soap and I will not be switching any time soon to another brand.

Title: It's super tacky and pulls your eye lashes
Review: Went to use it and felt like lt eye lashes were getting pulled out

Title: This isn't the correct color
Review: This polish color is darker than the bottle in the nail salon. And it dried in ugly clumps. Idk why.

Title: piece of chinese junk
Review: bloody thing Broke and could not return it.......uncool... it lasted 92 days......spend the extra 10 bucks and get a better cord

Title: Nice mascara, not waterproof
Review: Not waterproof, comes off easily. That is why I am deducting a star. Outside of that, I found that this mascara applied easily and it did make my lashes look fuller and longer. I made the mistake of going to sleep with my makeup still on (yes, I know, my bad) and woke up with some of the worst raccoon eyes I ever had. So, for the remainder of my use of this product, I will need to be sure I use my makeup remover every night. I cannot really recommend this product as I honestly prefer a waterproof and tend to lean towards Almay products. However, for other folks this may work great. As I mentioned, it does do an amazing job of building up your lashes and makes them look amazing. Just be sure you remove it nightly and don't plan to wear it if you may be exposed to any moisture (working out, weather, etc).

Title: Sure ... try it.
Review: We have only used it once, during a four (4) hour bus ride from Ma to NY, with my teenage son, and it worked pretty well. There were minor interruptions in the sound, but nothing that killed our vibes.

Title: Mad
Review: I sent this to the wrong address. Trying to stop it but getting nowhere. I'm so mad.

Title: Good size bag
Review: Good size bag.  A lot bigger than i pictured.  Lots of pockets and space inside.  I got the black one and the material is a bit shiny but a great deal for less than $15!  The front buckle is a hassle to undo so i probably won't use that pocket!

Title: Cream packaging not in English; cream is hydrating but acts as barrier; aroma okay Review: This jar of face cream comes with several small samples of their other products. Except for the tiny sample in the jar that looks half full (see photo), all the samples have some directions in English. However, the main cream does not. Everything is in Korean. This is a disappointment.

I tried this on my face and neck and the cream is hydrating. I personally am not crazy about the subtle odor. It is just okay and I'm glad it is light. Also the cream stays on top of my skin like a barrier and does not absorb much. This face cream is just okay and is not something I would order again. It lacks the instructions, absorption, and wonderful fragrance I am looking for in a face cream. It does have the hydration effect it should, however. I woke up in the morning with my face feeling really moisturized.

Title: Feeling sick! Even after taking precautions
Review: The results are absolutely amazing but I feel sick after using this even though I took precautions. I wore gloves, had 3 windows open and 2 fans blowing fumes away. I also wore a face mask but then switched to swim goggles after the fumes started burning my eyes even before I started blow drying.  Pretty results but this stuff is incredibly noxious. I probably wont use it again for a long time.

Title: Smells bad. Review: I was very excited to try this product. I cannot leave feedback as to whether or not it detoxes, I only used it once.

In appearance it's nice. It comes with it's own little bag that hangs under the faucet while running the water. The seaweed is nice and plump, yet not wet or mildewed. I suppose it's a good product as far as that is concerned.

It smells terrible! I did soak in it but I took a shower after because I was afraid the smell would linger.

I'm not into perfume smelling bath products. I rather unscented so I wasn't expecting it to smell like perfume. I just didn't expect it to smell so bad.

Title: Neutral set flatters most
Review: Nice set at a reasonable price. I got a few for gifts. I will say the lipstick is a bit grainy/dry but the color is very pretty. I mix it with balm or gloss to wear

Title: toe socks for yoga
Review: Just too hard to put on.  I tried several different methods to put them on, but my toes just don't want to cooperate.  I am not sure whose toes would, but I donated these immediately and purchased the same sock without toe holders.  Much happier with them.

Title: Very sparkly
Review: This is my first time trying these nail wraps. I'm not liking these particular ones just because they are very sparkly and I wanted something more subtle. And there are two films you need to remove which the ad didn't mention.  We'll see if they stay on.

Title: This tan is perfect for my very fair skin because goes on sheer; not moisturizing Review: When I ordered this, I was afraid it would be too dark or a color I had to use for the summer. However, because this moisturizer goes on sheer, it does not leave much color behind. This is obviously perfect for me but someone who is expecting a darker color will be sorely disappointed.

I cannot attest to its sun protection. I also do not feel like it moisturizes. However, this is perfect as a make-up base.

Title: WORST PURCHASE EVER
Review: THIS IS THE WORST PRODUCT I HAVE EVER PURCHASED ON AMAZON!.  IT HASN'T WORKED FOR MONTHS NOW. I AM SO FRUSTRATED WITH THIS TABLET. WILL NOT PAIR WITH THE DOCKING STATION AND NEEDLESS TO SAY ALEXA DOES NOT WORK. I'M 70 AND DON'T KNOW MUCH ABOUT TECHNOLOGY BUT THIS IS RIDICULOUS. AND I KEEP GETTING A MESSAGE THAT ALEXA WANTS TO TAKE OVER OTHER APPS. FINALLY BROKE DOWN AND GAVE PERMISSION JUST TO GET IT OFF THE SCREEN. STILL WILL NOT PAIR WITH DOCKING STATION AND IS USELESS. LENOVO SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF THEIR CUSTOMER SERVICE. I CALLED FOR HELP AND THEY SAID THEY COULD HELP BUT I HAD TO PAY THEM. PURCHASED TABLET ON JANUARY 2020! THIS DOES NOT WORK! DO NOT BUY IT.

Title: Lightweight scentless eye cream that is mildly moisturizing; too pricey
Review: I applied this cream to my eyes after a shower. It is lightweight and scentless and only mildly moisturizing. It is perfect for the summer. The current price of $60 is way too expensive for this cream. If it were much thicker and had a nice scent, then it would have received 4 or 5 stars from me depending on the price.

Title: This body soap is like washing with dessert; it lathers and cleans well and moisturizers too Review: This body wash lathers copiously, cleans well, and leaves my skin smooth and soft. However, the fragrance is too decadent for me. I love an intense aroma but this one is like washing with dessert.

I purchased this at Walmart on one of those impulse buys to try something new. Although I sniffed it before purchasing, I was surprised that it is more intense during use. If it smelled flowery instead of sweet, I would have loved it. I will not purchase this again.

Title: Okay
Review: To gain basic connectivity is good... streaming connections are workable but site hopping is not.  One can do e-mail and use it for office type tasks if wanted as well.  But it is light weight and pretty flimsy.  The mouse did not work and their 800-line made it easier to adapt something I had her than pay to have a n one sent... warranty?  Not really helpful/usable.  Again, okay for basic stuff but not good usage!

Title: Great camera for the money.
Review: Bought this camera in 2010 and I am still using it today. Great little, takes great pictures, is compact and versatile. You can rely on the Pentax name for quality and durability. No complaints.

Title: Didn't fit right
Review: Seemed to not fit well in the places it should lift.  I saw they ran a little small so got this because of the bigger size.  Still not crazy about it.  It washes well and maintains it's shape if you hang it to dry.

Title: High Quality Cords that give you fast charging
Review: These cords are very heavy duty and look to be stronger and nicer than the factory original that I got with my phone.  They seem to be very durable and very high quality.  Not very costly either.  If you need an additional cord or replacement cord for your phone, this is the one to get.

Title: Cheap material
Review: Cheap material stretches out of shape.

Title: Didn't work with Motorola 5g uw
Review: I read all directions and charged up my earbuds. I turned on my blue tooth and the earbuds wouldn't pair. I just sent back

Title: Nice Variety
Review: This is a good variety of costume type jewelry. The quality is okay, but they have a cheap look to them. I thought I would be able to easily bend one of the metal pendants, but it was sturdier than it looked. So they're not as cheaply made as they look. I like the styles. I do wish that some of them were longer or had one of those adjuster pieces at the clasp. Some of them hit me just below the chest and it looked awkward. I prefer for them to hang a little lower than that.

Title: Large barely fragrant bath bombs w/zero performance; turns water inky green Review: There are four individually wrapped bath bombs in this set. They are lightly fragrant but not really pleasingly so.

I dissolved one bomb in close to hot water and there were no suds created, only a fizzing action. The water immediately looked inky green. Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I use them in a foot bath. One bath bomb dissolves in less than five minutes in close to hot water. The fragrance was barely detectable. I personally would never want to bathe with these. I am glad, however, that the color did not adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels.

The current price of $10.99 comes to $2.75 per lackluster bath bomb. I'll pass on these as they are one of the worst bath bombs sets I ever tried.

Title: Doesn't last!
Review: I bought these slippers 18 months ago. Given moderate wearing, they did not at all hold up. The foam lost all resiliency and I have had to throw them away. I would strongly urge that you try another brand!

Title: Great for a maternity shirt!
Review: I purchased 3 of these shirts for a maternity shirt. I love the long length, the softness, and the shape. The only reason I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 is because two of them (floral patterns) started to fade and pill after less than 10 washes.

Title: Cute
Review: Cute, but I wish the pants were heavier.

Title: This shirt is soft but thin
Review: This t-shirt has soft fabric, but it is too thin to wear alone or to put vinyl lettering on.  It's a decent shirt to put under another shirt, but not to wear alone.  I would give these 5 stars if they were a thicker, better quality fabric.

Title: One Star
Review: Can't use with my PC to tv

Title: Nice but not comfortable
Review: These works great, sound is great but they are really uncomfortable.  My 13 year old first tried them and did not like them.  I tried them and also thought that they were uncomfortable.  They are too tight and hurt my ears after about 30 minutes of use.  I would not buy these for a teen or an adult.

Title: Okay for the price
Review: Okay for the price.  Radio has a lot of static and doesn't hold the station very well.  The CD player works good, but the tone is very tinny, and doesn't seem to have any bass.

Title: Great body balm, perfect for regular use!
Review: I love this ale Petit Marseillaise Hydrating Body Balm. I leave one at my desk at work and one by my television at home and I find myself regularly applying to my hands and even my feet. After using this for the better part of a month now, and my skin has never felt better. I am 62 years old and my hands have a tendency to look almost ‘scaly’. Using this body balm religiously (particularly after washing my hands) has made a noticeable and youthful improvement in my skin. I highly recommend this to everyone and the fragrance is light and great smelling as well!

Title: Absolutely love my new Kindle HD!
Review: I was currently an Ipad 4 user, having owned an Ipad 3 previously as well. I thought I was sold on Apple until till I purchased my nephew a 7" Kindle Fire HD for Christmas. When he opened the box and began to use it, I was mesmorized with the quality of the picture and the amazing sound. Being that I have been a Prime member for years, I began to consider purchasing one for myself so I could benefit from the free Kindle book loans and streaming videos. I purchased this 4G LTE 8.9" version on the Kindle Fire HD and after having used it for several days now non-stop, I assure you that the Ipad is going into the closet (or will be made a gift to one of my neices shortly). I could not resist the $49.99 package for 250 mb a month for 12 months along with the $50 credit Amazon was doing as a promotion. Surfing the web is easy, speed is amazing, I am just so happy with my purchase. You honestly can't get a better deal out there. I love the Fire HD!

Title: Works no better on me than creams or oils that are $60 cheaper
Review: At the current price of $90, this is outrageously priced. If I saw extreme results, I would have rated this 5 stars. I take two showers per day and always apply face creams (with retinol and without) and oils to my face and neck afterward. After using this, I noticed no difference in my face or neck compared to the creams and oils I use twice per day that are about $60 cheaper. In fact, my face looks a bit wind burned after using this and feels on the dry side. This is not an oil I would order again.

Title: It was a absolutely terrible. It came out in clumps.
Review: Horrible item and I have used this before and loved it. Maybe they changed the formula it was horrible!

Title: Corners are too shallow
Review: Generally speaking, I like the cover.  I wish, though, that the corners were a bit deeper so they gripped the IPad better.  I think the corners should click in, that would mean they’re being held tight. But they don’t and the IPad can be released too easily.  Fortunately, I don’t have to carry my IPad around like  some people do for their job.  I use mine mostly at a table or desk.  I’m happy that this cover has 3 grooves (instead of the 2 that many covers offer) to hold the IPad at different angles while being worked on, but it would be nice if they were deeper because when working on the IPad when it’s in the vertical position, it sometimes slides out of the groove and slams down.

Title: Perfect mount for my Bose soundbar
Review: I will start by saying I have an Omnimount tv mount and when I saw the sound bar mount in Vine, I was very excited to say the least. It is, naturally, a perfect match for wall mounted Panasonic 42" television in the Omnimount. It was easy to install (so easy, I was able to do it myself, someone who is usually shy of doing any kind of DIY activities. I love the way it fits and it looks like a professional mounting job all around. I highly recommend this sound bar mount (I am using it with my large Bose) especially if you buy it as a companion to the Omnimount television mounting system.

Title: Styes and Pink Eye! Don’t do it! 👀 Review: I purchased once and loved the results until I got two styles. I didn’t realize the connection until I developed pink eye a week later. I had not been around anyone with pink eye. Dr suspected it could be the mascara after ruling out contact with anyone with pink eye.
The wand was not tightly screwed to the tube when I got it and there is no factory safety seal.
Looks good, but not worth contaminating your eyes. I’d rather invest in a clean product than spend money for urgent care copay and cost of medication in addition to a day lost from work.

Title: Works great for a few days, afterwards charging levels are lowered.
Review: Waste of money. Deal is too good to be true.

Title: Okay
Review: The unit is very simple to use except when your check a 9V battery. The contacts are kind of cumbersome when trying to  line up the contacts correctly to view the battery power.  I would have given it 4 stars of higher if  it wasn't for this problem.

Title: blink mount
Review: If you are investing in the Blink cameras (as we have with 2 separate systems) you'll find that these mounts are much better that what comes with them.  More sturdy, with more accessible positions.  My husband feels they are even easier to install than the clip type that comes with the system.  We feel these mounts are worth the few extra dollars to get these and have now replaced all our cameras with these mounts.  Love love LOVE the Blink system!  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I really hope my review was helpful to you in some way.

Title: For people with extremely high arches.
Review: If you do not have a very high and well defined arch, this product is not for you.

Title: Thin but warm
Review: This is a hot polyester thin shirt, too thin to be called a sweater.

Title: Love the leather and the color but the design limits what this can hold Review: This leather wallet only has room for four cards. Of course, one can stuff two cards in each slot but that is still not enough, in my opinion

I love the caramel color and the feel of the leather. However, the center section is the only place that has slots for cards. There is room for one card on either side and for one card behind each of those slots. One slot has a pull-tab to make it easy to remove the ID.

It has RFID protection but I have no way of verifying that.

I have no idea how much this would cost but I expect this to be priced around $7. It is stylish but the design is not minimal even though what can be held within is. It comes in a giftable box.

The only reason I took off two stars is because of the limited amount of cards that can be put in what is a thick wallet.

Title: Big, oddly-shaped bobby-pin-style bows that cannot be displayed correctly Review: These bows are pretty but they are oddly shaped with an extra loop on one side and the white of some of the loops are showing. They are clip style bows and hold the hair well. They are more for a young girl because these bows are large at about 7" from tip to tip. I do not feel a young girl will mind too much if these are not perfect but I mind.

The bows I received look nothing like the perfect that is pictured. At the current price of $12.98, these come to $6.49 each and should be perfect at that price.

Title: Meh
Review: I have been a fan of Hanalei lip products for a few years now. Their lip scrub is amazing!! This lip treatment just leaves me feeling "meh". It's very thick and difficult to dispense. The pumpkin spice scent is minimal. It doesn't feel any different than just applying Vaseline on my lips. It's definitely not the worst product out there, but to me, it's just okay.

Title: No pigmant.
Review: I would not use these again except to make my nail even. Takes forever to cure and barely any color at all. No matter the amount of layers.

Title: Love them!!!
Review: Best glasses EVER

Title: Amazing sunscreen helps soften your skin and protect you from the harmful effects of the sun
Review: I really liked this Olay product. First, it is non-greasy (unlike most sunscreens). It also has anti-aging factors that help protect and moisturizer my 60 something year old face. If I have any complaints at all it's that I typically use a higher SPF on my face (50+) to help protect me from signs of aging and to help fight the effects of the sun on my exposed areas of my face. However, all in all this is really a nice serum and my face feels great after applying it.

Title: Good value for the price
Review: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

Title: Awful!
Review: Terrible outdated nonsense. Doesn't do well with Samsung or LG tv's!! Useless

Title: Bright.
Review: Nice.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Nice sound for such a small speaker
Title: Good company bad product Review: Product was not working on arrival but company was quick to refund

Title: Buy it
Review: First scarf EVER that didn’t leave oil stains on my pillow, and it stays on all night!! 😍😍😍 No Complaints!!

Title: Perfect set of clippers, couldn't ask for better
Review: I was looking for something to help aid my family during this pandemic and this set of clippers is just what I was looking for. Easy to use, easy to change heads, this clipper makes it easy to cut male hair (and trust me, I didn't have a lot of confidence in my own hair cutting skills). Fits well in my hand and is able to maneuver easily. I believe every house should have this clipper in their house to have in the event they are either unable to get out for a formal cut or simply to do a quick clean up between formal cuts.  Highly recommend.

Title: silver rhinestone headband
Review: I purchased to wear during the holidays but I will say that it is really uncomfortable.  I tried to stretch open it a bit, but it's still too tight.  I have an average head - so if you have a small size head - maybe it would be less uncomfortable.  I am going to see if one of my young nieces want it.

Title: Had this 2 weeks and threw it away!
Review: Can’t get the traction you need to actually scrub your back properly.

Title: Not volumizing and has a terrible smell; had to wash my hair all over again to remove product Review: I have short to medium fine curly hair. I love to use volumizing shampoos when I can get them and this was advertised as such. However, when I received the shampoo, it is actually a hair loss prevention shampoo. It also should NOT be used daily and says so on the bottle.

I decided to try this anyway. It smells terrible to me--like sour watermelon. It has a lackluster lather and feels as if I am adding a grease to my hair. My hair felt flat and lousy after using this. I actually decided to re-wash my hair with my regular shampoo.

I have no idea if this shampoo will stop hair loss but the fact that it cannot be used daily worries me as it is probably more of a medical product than a general shampoo. I hate the aroma and how it makes my hair feel.

Title: Blah
Review: Only reacts to Cold Water waste of money. Vendor says it reacts to hot,  tested this numerous times,  it did not.  Refund would be nice<<

Title: Nicely crafted but short
Review: This are nicely made elephant earrings in a gold plating. I am deducting a star because they are smaller than I thought they would be. Although the elephant itself is an ok size, there really is a minimal dangle (they basically just dangle off the bottom of the ear, no additional hang). I typically like to wear dangle earrings where they are at least a 1/2 to full inch (or more) below the bottom of my ear. If you like shorter dangle elephant earrings than these may be for you.

Title: Just ok
Review: I really like Mac Mineral Powder, but don't like the price. I thought I would try this and it's ok. It just seems I have to put more on than Mac's and after awhile it just looks darker and kind of orange whereas Mac's blends way better.

Title: Horribly Cheap Looking
Review: It's very cheap looking and you can't change the time. A waist of money!!

Title: Nice for a regular shampoo Review: My husband has been using this Catalase shampoo, and likes it.
Although if your gray hair is suppose to darken that is not happening.
I have been reading about Catalase and it seems it can bring back,your natural color hair,
Keep it from getting gray! Not sure how long that takes?

I’m letting my light br, and blonde weaved dyed hair grow out to my natural silver color, and don’t want to
Take a chance of this darkening the Silver..

3 star for a regular shampoo

Title: Poor quality
Review: Looks great, but the corner is already breaking and I've used it for less than a month. I guess I should have gone with a more expensive option.

Title: Hard to remove cap
Review: So, the opening cap is pretty hard to remove and the compartment is pretty small.  But it does really look and feel like a big round brush.  Would be an effective place to hold VERY small things.

Title: Who knew it could be this easy and quick?
Review: I never tried at home waxing before. I was surprised how easy this was to use. I was able to easily do my legs and it was relatively painless. I heated up the wax and used it almost immediately. It was not super hot and it easily grasped the hair and removed it. I was able to cover it and reuse it again in a few days. This should save me a ton of money from salon visits. Highly recommend this wax warmer for anyone.

Title: Absolutely loved the Gourmet variety
Review: Wish I knew where this was made (I couldn't find the origin on the bottles unless it was in super tiny print that I couldn't make out). Anyway, giving it 4 stars mainly because of the Gourmet variety. I love the mango scent and the gel does a great job of cleaning. I felt refreshed and revitalized the entire day. I didn't particularly care for the scent of the other two bottles. Shine was way too strong and Perfume had a rich rose fragrance (too overbearing for my tastes). Anyway, these are reasonably priced. The scents are definitely for women (not men for sure) and they do a great job of making you feel clean. I will use the Gourmet until the bottle is finished, not sure about the other two as they are too strong for me

Title: Nice fabric, runs small
Review: The design and fabric are great but they run very small.

Title: Five Stars
Review: All of these dresses are beautiful and fit well!!! I have 8 of them ;)

Title: Nice material, shrunk after washing and drying.. Review: Size medium.
Nice tank ,its 95% cotton, & 5% Spandex.
The color is a light gray and looks good .

After washing and drying this tank shrunk a bit. It fit my husband tighter then what he likes to wear.
He is 5’9, 155 lbs.

I only received 1, not 3!

Title: Two Stars
Review: Big toe went through sock after only a couple of wears.

Title: Quality made
Review: Well made and generous length cords.

Title: Good
Review: Clear, simple case does its job in protecting the back of the iPod. It's a loose clip, but seems to hold well on my shorts when I run.

Title: Great, High Quality Luggage Tags Review: Great luggage tags! I recently realized I needed new luggage tags right before a trip. These came super fast & they were very high quality.

If you're looking for a high quality & affordable luggage tag, this is the product for you!

Title: Didn’t use to big
Review: Bulky

Title: Too Tight
Review: I ordered the same size I wear all the time.  When I tried the shirt on I had a hard time going over the top half and then was not flowing, but rather quite tight. Looked really nice and comfortable if it fit.  Hopefully I can return and get a new pair.

Title: Style rec’d differs from what I ordered; these are loose and thick Review: I ordered the black red elk socks style and I received the black and red checkered style socks. These are made of 91% Acrylic, 8% Polyester, and 1% Spandex. They are thick, warm, and loose. They feel comfortable but since they are so thick, I have to wear them with my large boots. Overall, I like these socks but the style one orders may not be the one received.

I do not feel these socks should cost more than $10 and the prices on Amazon are all over the place depending on style.

Title: Samsung Quality- Love it.
Review: Just received this product, hesitated to buy it. But I love all Samsung products, they are more ad expected, for quality, and the little make life easier things. I own a phone which I love from Samsung, then I bought a washing machine, recently a Microwave, refrigerator, my husband owns for 5 years a Samsun 60 inch TV. I am amazed by the details and quality of everything, inside and out of the products. Just received this TV 24inch in for my kitchen, beautiful, color, so easy to set up, needed no help from my husband. Even the clicker is first class. So easy to adjust on this TV. I am so pleased I purchased this quality product. It is no cheap looking. I went to Sams for Black Friday, no Samsung even close for this price, another brand was $299.00 for the 24 inch. I already told my husband, if Samsung makes the product it is first class. Since I am from Germany I own a Bosch washer for the last 15 years, I would not hesitate to replace it with a Samsung. (Samsung does not make dishwashers)Do not hesitate to buy this TV, you will be pleased.

Title: Simple rain over coat, nice colors
Review: This is only a rain coat, not lined, hood attached, storage pouch included, side pockets.  Fits well. Went a size up to wear over thicker sweaters for cooler wet weather. Would buy again.

Title: Fingerless gloves
Review: They are beautiful on.

Title: cheap,looking and cheaply made
Review: i returned this because it did not exemplify nice to me.

Title: Don't buy
Review: Garbage! These are 4 inches tall lol

Title: Doesn't work for THICK hair
Review: I have thick hair and have to use 3 of these to keep my hair up. My hair is about to my collar bone and if it was longer might be easier to keep up. I thought these were great the first time I tried but then my hair kept falling down so I had to keep adding more clips to keep my hair up. I will probably just end up purchasing a more expensive higher quality French twist comb for my thick hair. Oh also the prongs after a few uses are already bending and coming out of shape. Not a horrible comb but not that good either.

Title: Snug
Review: I am a plus size mom. I usually wear a size XL in women's t-shirts. This probably is more of a junior fit. It was a snug fit on me, especially in the arms. The picture in the description shows it pretty loose as far as fit goes. It's a cute shirt though the fabric is really light weight. I wish it fit better.

Title: Small
Review: It looks beautiful and very thick but it ran too small.  Disappointed in the buy as I bought bigger than normal and it was still small.

Title: Rugged, durable, but runs hot
Review: This is a lifesaver for backing up my SD card on the go (I normally shoot with two 128GB cards); I love that the design is rugged and durable (if on the heavy side). Setup took only seconds. Only potential downside is that the unit runs very hot when left on for prolonged periods...and if you're copying over a significant number of files, that's likely to happen, so I would leave it in the open / a well-ventilated space rather than stashed in your camera bag. Otherwise another great tool for serious photographers!

Title: Great little fan!!!
Review: Great little fan! Was surprised how much air it put out. Small enough to slip into a pocket or my purse. Happy with my purchase.

Title: Made my hair soft, and itchy. Review: I’m letting my hair grow out to its natural color, and my natual hair does not have the body that dyed hair does.
Styling foam usually does give your hair body , and makes it a bit stiff. ( I use pureology).

This Nioxin I used mainly on my roots after shampooing & Conditioning, and towel dryed hair.
The only thing Nioxin did was, it made my hair soft like a conditioner would, and later that night my scalp started to itch!!

Title: Super nice hand moisturizer!
Review: I have been using Dove products for years now. From moisturizers made exclusively for your face to overall body ones, Dove always provides a quality product at a reasonable price. This hand cream lives up to the Dove brand. It is creamy and once applied makes my hands feel noticeably softer and smoother. I tend to have really dry hands (and feet) and this moisturizer has really made a difference in my 60 something year old skin. I highly recommend for men and women and all skin types. And to top it off, it comes in a value multi-pack!

Title: Not worth it Review: If these were refurbished in other countries not everything downloads.
Just purchase from apple!

Title: Attractive & large clips; holds a lot of hair but does not stay put in fine hair Review: These hair clips are large. There are six clips in total. There are two clips that do not have any spikes inside and four that do. I love the colors.

These clips are very functional for those with thick long hair. They feel sturdy and hold a lot of hair but they do not stay put because the spikes are in the wrong place to grip fine hair well. 

The current price of $7.99 is reasonably priced at  $1.33 per clip. I do wish they held fine hair better, however.

Title: Light and easy to use
Review: I don't need a headset like this often, typically just a couple of times a week to do a video call with my Mother. The headphones help me block distractions and hear her more clearly. This is a very light weight set and the plastic feels a bit flimsy. I don't expect this to last more than a year with my light use, but in the meantime they do work for my needs.

Title: Set consists of two clippers & NOT three as pictured, one nail file & one case Review: The only reason I rated this 3 stars is because I did not receive what I thought I was ordering. Other than this, this is a solid 4.5 star set.

I received two nail clippers (toe and finger) and one nail file all in a tin case. The clippers are sharp and clip very well. It did take me a minute to figure out how to work these. What I had to do was flip the lever forward to engage the spring action of the clipper. Once that was done, they worked great. The nail file is a typical metal file that works like every other metal file on the market.

In order to get these back in the case, the lever on the files have to be flipped into the low-profile position - meaning toward the handle.

The current price of $16.95 is competitive for the set picture but too pricey for the set received. I would not expect to pay more than $12 for the set received. Nevertheless, this is a very nice set that works as designed.

Title: Hurt my ear
Review: These have ok sound but fit into my ear funny. I cant really use. Might just be the shape of my ear but they hurt. If they fit your ear, the sound is great.

Title: Good for upper lip hair
Review: This worked great for my upper lip peach fuzz. It did take off all of it, which is definitely now going to save me waxing dollars each month. Where it didn't seem to work well was in other areas (like eyebrows). Seems to only be good on light hair (not courser hair). Rating it as 4 stars because, for me, it can only be used on one part of my body to work well. Also not sure how well it is made, seems kind of flimsy and top (blades) seem to come off too easily.

Title: Huge Bel bottoms and totally different pants!! Review: I have ordered two pair of these exact pants for work. A Black and a blue color. They were durable, well fitting everywhere! So, I ordered another black pair. The ones that showed up are tight in thighs, loose in mid-ish waste and the high waters that are ENORMOUS bell bottoms from 1973 look ridiculous!!!
I'm not sure where this pair of pants came from but, they are going back! They are NOTHING like the 2 pair I ordered previously. I like the first 2 pr. Very much. I guess you take your chances when ordering. There was no additional style ... I ordered the exact same pants as previous. I just got these really ill fitting ugly pants I could never wear to work.
Roll the dice I guess! 😔

Title: Nice
Review: Edit: broke already. My daughter loved it til it broke. Not strong bracelet, broke easily

Title: I'm sorry already...ugh Review: The video on this computer sucks. I have had a similar HP laptop for the past 5 years and had nice clear video. This computer has awful video on zoom and does not support a virtual background. The colors are not sharp and it looks like the contrast is off. I am so disappointed that I paid this much for a laptop that is worse than the one I was replacing. Beware.
I am so upset about this purchase that I can’t sleep. I hope something can be corrected.

Title: Nice quality - sturdy hinges and nice metal casing Lays ... Review: Returned it. Would not stay connected to either of my laptops. Once I moved it more than 5/6 inches away, it would disconnect every time.

PROS:
Nice quality - sturdy hinges and nice metal casing
Lays flat
Nice size
Good 'key feel' when typing
Mouse pad worked well
Nice and compact when folded - would be easy to travel with

CONS:
Would not stay connected if moved more than 5" away (Asus Zenbook and HP Envy)

Title: Beautiful
Review: Beautiful. I wore it to  work and received several compliments.

Title: DON'T BUY!

If you don't want to do that, then the flap has to be on the right side so you close it from right to left which is just weird. I can't image why they would make it this way. Maybe I got a defective one? But after looking at every single review it seems other people had this issue too. I just didn't read enough reviews first. I won't buy anything else from this seller!

Title: Great shampoo and conditioner for men!
Review: I will say that for people of a 'certain generation', they may not like this. I originally asked my 35 year old son to try and review this, but he said he didn't like 'Old Spice'. So, I had my 70 year old brother try it. In regards to my brother, he absolutely loved this pairing. He loved the fragrance and the way his hair was clean and super soft after using the shampoo and conditioner. I guess the stigma of Old Spice is still out there as an 'old man' fragrance, but I don't understand it. I found the fragrance to be pleasant and my brother's hair looks great after using this exclusively for several weeks now. Old Spice will need to change some of their marketing ploys to begin catering to a younger group of men, but I will say that for my brother, he loved it.

Title: Great camo - a little lighter than expected- but covers imperfections flawlessly!
Review: I really do love these Thermoblend products. Great makeup. This 'camo' is easy to apply and covers all skin imperfections (i.e. I have some skin damage from the sun with age spots). I did deduct one star simply because I thought this was a little lighter than I was expecting. I ended up smoothing it out and covering it with my standard foundation so the lightness blended easily away. I do recommend Thermoblend overall because of the way my skin looks (virtually flawless) after using these products.

Title: Heavy tube of deodorant; works up to 8 hours on me but I hate the smell Review: This is a 2.8-ounce solid tube of deodorant. I love the container as there is a wheel on the bottom that I can turn to release small increments of the balm.  It  glides smoothly and feels moisturizing. Unfortunately, since this does not have aluminum (which I require), I stink after eight hours. The fact that it even lasted eight hours is amazing because other non-aluminum deodorants last me only two to four hours and one lasted me six hours. Since I take a shower every 12 hours, I do not need long-length protection. 

The results are four stars for me considering my track record with non-aluminum deodorants.. I rated it two stars because I absolutely hate the rosemary witch hazel scent. I cannot even describe the aroma, but it offends my senses. I am glad my nose is not near my armpit because I would have thrown this out already if it were.

The current price of $17.99 is expensive for this 2.8-ounce tube.

Title: Picture quality isn’t that good
Review: I got this for my friend and he’s generally pleased about this product. The keyboard control is very helpful. But the picture quality isn’t as good as other brands like Apple TV or roku. The price is very reasonable, and for what it is, it’s a good product
